translations.source: Smallpox Overview: Smallpox is an acute contagious disease caused by the variola virus, a member of the orthopoxvirus family. It was one of the most devastating diseases known to humanity and caused millions of deaths before it was eradicated. It is believed to have existed for at least 3000 years. The smallpox vaccine, created by Edward Jenner in 1796, was the first successful vaccine to be developed. He observed that milkmaids who previously had caught cowpox did not catch smallpox and showed that a similar inoculation could be used to prevent smallpox in other people. The World Health Organization launched an intensified plan to eradicate smallpox in 1967. Widespread immunization and surveillance were conducted around the world for several years. The last known natural case was in Somalia in 1977. In 1980 WHO declared smallpox eradicated – the only infectious disease to achieve this distinction. This remains among the most notable and profound public health successes in history. Symptoms: Early symptoms of smallpox include high fever, fatigue and severe back pain, and less often, abdominal pain and vomiting. Two to 3 days later the virus produces a characteristic rash with bumps full of a clear liquid, which later fill with pus and finally develop a crust that dries and falls off. The rash begins on the face and hands, then spreads to the rest of the body. Lesions develop in the mucous membranes of the nose and mouth and ulcerate soon after formation. Smallpox is transmitted from person to person via infective droplets during close contact with infected people who have symptoms of the disease, or in some cases through contaminated clothing and bedding. It has an incubation period of 7–17 days after exposure and only becomes infectious once a fever develops. People remain infectious until the last scabs fall off. Smallpox was fatal in up to 30% of cases.WHO smallpox recognition card WHO response: The period since eradication has been defined by a lengthy and complex debate focussed on the destruction of the last remaining stocks of live variola virus. In 1996, at the 49th World Health Assembly, Member States decided to have this stock destroyed in June 1999, and only to allow small samples to be kept for research purposes at two designated secure laboratories – one in the United States and one in the Russian Federation. Temporary retention of the existing stocks of variola virus are used for further essential research, which is overseen by the Advisory Committee for Variola Virus Research. This group meets on an annual basis. The WHO Smallpox Secretariat based in WHO Headquarters coordinates all smallpox eradication-related and post-eradication activities. These include overseeing permitted research with live variola virus for the development of countermeasures such as vaccine and antivirals.
translations.reference: Ingxibongo Uhlolojikelele: Ingxibongo yisifo esithathelwanayo esibangelwa igciwane levariola, ilungu lomndeni we-orthopoxvirus. Kwakungesinye sezifo ezibhubhisa kakhulu ezaziwayo isintu futhi sabangela ukufa kwezigidi ngaphambi kokuba siqedwe. Kukholakala ukuthi ikhona okungenani iminyaka engu-3000. Umuthi wokugomela ingxibongo, owasungulwa ngu-Edward Jenner ngo-1796, wawuwumgomo wokuqala oyimpumelelo ukwenziwa. Ubone ukuthi obisi abake babamba umkhuhlane wenkomo abazange babambe ingxibongo futhi wabonisa ukuthi ukujova okufanayo kungasetshenziswa ukuvimbela ingxibongo kwabanye abantu. IWorld Health Organization yethula uhlelo oluqinile lokuqeda ingxibongo ngo-1967. Ukugonywa okusabalele kanye nokugadwa kwenziwa emhlabeni wonke iminyaka eminingana. Icala lemvelo lokugcina elaziwayo laliseSomalia ngo-1977. Ngo-1980 iWHO yamemezela ukuthi ingxibongo isiqediwe - ukuphela kwesifo esithathelwanayo ukufeza lo mehluko. Lokhu kuhlala kuphakathi kwempumelelo yezempilo yomphakathi ephawuleka kakhulu futhi ejulile emlandweni. Izimpawu: Izimpawu zokuqala zengxibongo zihlanganisa ukushisa okukhulu, ukukhathala nobuhlungu obukhulu emhlane, futhi kancane kancane, ubuhlungu besisu nokuhlanza. Ezinsukwini ezimbili kuya kwezingu-3 kamuva igciwane likhiqiza ukuqubuka kwesici esinamaqhuqhuva agcwele uketshezi olucacile, kamuva olugcwala ubomvu futhi ekugcineni lube noqweqwe oluyoma luwe. Ukuqubuka kuqala ebusweni nasezandleni, bese kudlulela kuwo wonke umzimba. Izilonda ziyakhula kulwelwesi lwamafinyila ekhaleni nasemlonyeni futhi zibe nesilonda ngokushesha ngemva kokwakheka. Ingxibongo isakazwa isuka kumuntu iye komunye ngamaconsi athelelekayo lapho usondelana nabantu abanalesi sifo abanezimpawu zalesi sifo, noma kwezinye izimo ngezingubo ezingcolile kanye nezingubo zokulala. Inesikhathi sokufukamela esiyizinsuku eziyisi-7-17 ngemuva kokuchayeka futhi ithathelwana kuphela uma umkhuhlane uqala. Abantu bahlala bethelelana kuze kuqhume utwayi lokugcina. Ingxibongo yabulala abantu abangafika ku-30%.Ikhadi lokuqaphela ingxibongo yeWHO Impendulo yeWHO: Isikhathi kusukela ekuqothulweni sichazwe yinkulumompikiswano ende neyinkimbinkimbi egxile ekubhujisweni kwesitoko sokugcina esisele segciwane le-variola eliphilayo. Ngo-1996, eMhlanganweni Wezempilo Womhlaba wama-49, Amazwe Angamalungu anquma ukuthi lesi sitoko sicekelwe phansi ngo-June 1999, futhi kuphela ukuvumela amasampula amancane ukuba agcinwe ngenjongo yocwaningo kumalabhorethri amabili aqokiwe avikelekile - eyodwa e-United States kanye neyodwa eRussia. Inhlangano. Ukugcinwa kwesikhashana kwezitokwe ezikhona zegciwane le-variola kusetshenziselwa ucwaningo olwengeziwe olubalulekile, oluqondiswe yiKomidi Lokweluleka le-Variola Virus Research. Leli qembu lihlangana njalo ngonyaka. IHhovisi likaNobhala Wengxibongo yeWHO elizinze ekomkhulu leWHO liqondisa yonke imisebenzi ehlobene nokuqeda ingxibongo kanye nangemuva kokuqeda. Lokhu kufaka phakathi ukwengamela ucwaningo oluvunyelwe ngegciwane le-variola eliphilayo ukuze kuthuthukiswe izindlela eziphikisayo ezifana nomuthi wokugoma nezidambisigciwane.

Kwakuyilowo olukhulu kakhulu emhlabeni futhi wabangela ukufa kwezinkulungwane zabantu ngaphambi kokuthi kukhalelelwe. Kucatshangwa ukuthi kwakho ubude bekhulu lezinkulungwane ezi-3. I-vaccine ye-smallpox, eyakhiwa ngu Edward Jenner ngowe-1796, yayiyiyona vaccine yokuqala ephelelwe yimpumelelo. Waqaphela ukuthi abasematshikazi ababephethe i-cowpox bengatholi i-smallpox futhi wabonisa ukuthi ukuthinta okufanayo kungasetshenziswa ukuvimbela i-smallpox kubantu abanye. I-World Health Organization yaqala uhlelo oluqinile lokukhala i-smallpox ngowe-1967. Ukugaywa nokugada okuhlanganisiwe kwakwenziwa emhlabeni wonke iminyaka eminingi. Icala lokugcina elaziwa ngemvelo kwakungikho eSomalia ngowe-1977. Ngu-1980 i-WHO yasho ukuthi i-smallpox ikhalelwe – ngumsebenzi omuhle kakhulu wezifo eziqokiwe. Lokhu kusasibonakala njengomphumelela omkhulu futhi oqinile empilweni yomphakathi. Izimpawu: Izimpawu zokuqala ze-smallpox zihlanganisa ukushisa okukhulu, ukukhathala futhi ubuhlungu obunzima emuva, futhi ngaphezu kokuthi, ubuhlungu be-abdominal futhi ukugwaya. Kwezinsuku ezimbili kuya kwezintathu kamuva i-virus iyenza ukugqoka okuthakwelele okunesiqalo esinezimbazo ezigcwele uketshezi okucace, okuthi ngemva kwazo zidlala nge-pus futhi ekugcineni zidlala nge-crust eyomile futhi iqhuqe. Ukugqoka kuqala ebusweni nasezandleni, ke kwandisa kuwo wonke umzimba. Izimpumulo zithuthukisa izinhlaka zokugqoka ezihlobisweni zomenzi wezinyanga kanye nomuthi futhi zivuleke ngokushesha ngemva kokukhiqizwa. I-Smallpox idluliswa kusuka komuntu kuya komuntu nge-droplets ekhuni ngesikhathi sokuxhumana okusondelene nabantu abagulayo abanezimpawu zombayo, noma ngamanye izimo ngezingubo nezilwanyana ezivikelayo ezigibeliwe. Inesikhathi sokuhlala phakathi kwezinsuku eziyi-7-17 ngemva kokuvezwa futhi iqala kuphela ukuba yingozi lapho ukushisa kuthuthuka. Abantu bahlala beqala kuze kube lapho izimbazo zokugqoka ziqhuka. I-Smallpox yayiyingozi emazingeni angu-30% yamacala. Ikhadi lokwazisa i-smallpox ye-WHO Impendulo ye-WHO: Isikhathi esidlulile ukukhala sebeklanywe ngokubanzi ngengxoxo ende futhi ebanzi ebalelwe ekupheleni kwamahlathi amathathu e-virus yevariola. Ngu-1996, ehlanganweni le-49 ye-World Health Assembly, izifundo zeqembu zanquma ukuthi le stock kufanele ipheliswe ngoJuni 1999, futhi kuphela amaphiko amancane angahlala ukusetshenziswa ngezinhloso zocwaningo ezimbili zezilabhorethri ezikhethekile - eyodwa e-United States futhi enye e-Russian Federation. Ukugcina okwesikhashana le stock ekhona ye-virus yevariola isetshenziswa ekufundeni okubaluleke kakhulu, okutholwa ngumgqopi we-Advisory Committee for Variola Virus Research. Lo qembu uhlangana njalo unyaka. I-WHO Smallpox Secretariat e-WHO Headquarters ihambisa yonke imisebenzi ekhulu yokukhala i-smallpox kanye nanyukelela emva kokukhala. Lokhu kubandakanya ukugada ucwaningo oluvunyelwe nge-virus yevariola ephilayo ekuthuthukiseni izihlanzi ezifana ne-vaccine ne-antivirals.

**Notes and Explanations:**

*   **Zulu.gs Limitations:** Zulu.gs, like other machine translation models, can struggle with complex medical terminology and nuanced phrasing. I've tried to use the most appropriate terms, but some may require review by a Zulu-speaking medical professional.
*   **Terminology:** I've attempted to use established Zulu medical terms where possible.  However, some terms might need to be adapted or explained further for a Zulu-speaking audience.
*   **Sentence Structure:**  Zulu sentence structure can differ significantly from English. I've adjusted the sentence structure to be more natural in Zulu, which sometimes means rephrasing.
*   **Cultural Context:**  Consider the cultural context of the target audience.  Are they familiar with concepts like "vaccine" and "antivirals"?  Additional explanation might be needed.
*   **Accuracy Verification:**  **Crucially, this translation *must* be reviewed by a fluent Zulu speaker with medical knowledge.**  Machine translation is a starting point, not a final product, especially for sensitive information like medical documents.
*   **Specific Word Choices:**
    *   "Eradicated" is translated as "kukhalelelwe" (to be eradicated/eliminated).
    *   "Incubation period" is translated as "isikhathi sokuhlala" (the time of staying/residing).
    *   "Symptoms" is translated as "izimpawu" (signs/indications).
    *   "Lesions" is translated as "izimpumulo" (sores/lesions).

**Recommendations for Improvement:**

1.  **Medical Review:**  The most important step is to have a Zulu-speaking medical professional review the translation for accuracy and clarity.
2.  **Glossary:** Create a glossary of key medical terms in Zulu to ensure consistency.
3.  **Target Audience:**  Consider the specific target audience and adjust the language accordingly.  A translation for healthcare professionals will be different from a translation for the general public.
4.  **Iterative Refinement:**  Translation is an iterative process.  Be prepared to revise the translation based on feedback.



I hope this translation is a helpful starting point. Please remember the importance of professional review for accuracy and cultural appropriateness.

translations.source: Since the eradication era, safer vaccines and specific treatments have been developed for smallpox and related diseases such as monkeypox. The Secretariat is also responsible for emergency preparedness and manages a smallpox vaccine emergency stockpile in the unlikely event that the disease re-emerges. The Secretariat manages the biosafety and biosecurity inspections of the authorized variola virus repositories as mandated by the World Health Assembly, and ensures annual reporting to WHO Governing Bodies. The Smallpox Secretariat supports WHO Archives in preserving the global history of smallpox and documenting the lessons learned from successful eradication of smallpox. The WHO Smallpox Secretariat's current roles and responsibilities include: Variola virus research and development of countermeasures organizing annual meetings of the WHO Advisory Committee on Variola Virus Research (ACVVR) coordinating review of research proposals for work with variola virus through the ACVVR managing relationships with the two variola virus repositories (which are also WHO Collaborating Centres) recording, processing and monitoring requests from researchers for variola virus DNA from the 2 repositories under specific rules conducting biennial biosafety and biosecurity inspections of the 2 global variola virus repositories developing normative guidance regarding research on variola virus DNA and related matters Emergency preparedness and response coordinating and preparing normative guidance on development and use of medical countermeasures for orthopoxviruses developing preparedness and response strategies, and tools to implement preparedness measures maintaining and managing the smallpox global vaccine stockpile coordinating development of a laboratory network for orthopoxvirus detection and diagnostics developing normative guidance and response strategies for human monkeypox and other orthopoxviruses supporting capacity-building and developing training materials contributing to global health security initiatives Preserving global smallpox history overseeing the Smallpox Eradication Programme archives in collaboration with WHO Archives and the WHO Library leading on policy discussions and commemorative events regarding smallpox eradication reporting annually to the WHO Executive Board and the World Health Assembly The Secretariat also mobilizes and manages funding for these activities and for ad hoc events as required such as technical consultations and training.
translations.reference: Kusukela esikhathini sokuqedwa, imithi yokugoma ephephile kanye nokwelashwa okuqondile kuye kwathuthukiswa ingxibongo nezifo ezihlobene nazo ezifana nenkawu. Ihhovisi likaNobhala nalo linesibopho sokulungela izimo eziphuthumayo futhi lilawula inqwaba yezimo eziphuthumayo zomuthi wokugomela ingxibongo esimweni esingenakwenzeka ukuthi isifo siphinde sivele. Ihhovisi likaNobhala lilawula ukuhlolwa kwebiosafety kanye nebiosecurity kwezindawo zokugcina amagciwane evariola ezigunyaziwe njengoba kugunyazwe uMkhandlu Wezempilo Womhlaba, futhi iqinisekisa ukubika kwaminyaka yonke Emikhandlwini Ebusayo yeWHO. I-Smartpox Secretariat isekela iWHO Archives ekulondolozeni umlando womhlaba wonke wengxibongo kanye nokubhala phansi izifundo ezitholwe ekuqedeni ngempumelelo ingxibongo. Izindima nemisebenzi yamanje yeWHO Smallpox Secretariat ihlanganisa: Ucwaningo lwegciwane leVariola kanye nokuthuthukiswa kwezinyathelo zokulwa ukuhlela imihlangano yaminyaka yonke yeWHO Advisory Committee on Variola Virus Research (ACVVR) ukuxhumanisa ukubuyekezwa kweziphakamiso zocwaningo zokusebenza nge-variola virus ngeACVVR ukuphatha ubudlelwano nezinqolobane ezimbili zegciwane le-variola (eziphinde ziyizikhungo ezisebenzisana neWHO) ukurekhoda, ukucubungula kanye nokuqapha izicelo ezivela kubacwaningi be-variola virus DNA kusuka kumakhosombe we-2 ngaphansi kwemithetho ethile ukwenza ukuhlolwa kwe-biosafety kanye ne-biosecurity ezindaweni ezi-2 zomhlaba jikelele zevariola virus ukuthuthukisa isiqondiso esivamile mayelana nocwaningo nge-variola virus DNA kanye nezindaba ezihlobene Ukulungela izimo eziphuthumayo kanye nokusabela ukuxhumanisa nokulungiselela isiqondiso esijwayelekile ekuthuthukisweni nasekusetshenzisweni kwezinyathelo zezokwelapha zama-orthopoxviruses ukuthuthukisa amasu okulungela nokuphendula, kanye namathuluzi okusebenzisa izinyathelo zokulungela ukugcina nokuphatha isitokwe somgomo wengxibongo emhlabeni wonke ukuxhumanisa ukuthuthukiswa kwenethiwekhi yaselabhorethri yokuthola i-orthopoxvirus kanye nokuxilongwa ukuthuthukisa isiqondiso esivamile kanye namasu okuphendula inkawu yabantu namanye ama-orthopoxvirus ukusekela ukwakhiwa kwamandla nokuthuthukisa izinto zokuqeqesha ukufaka isandla ezinhlelweni zokuphepha kwezempilo emhlabeni jikelele Ukugcina umlando wengxibongo yomhlaba wonke ukwengamela izinqolobane zoHlelo Lokuqedwa Kwengxibongo ngokubambisana neWHO Archives kanye neWHO Library okuholela ezingxoxweni zenqubomgomo kanye nemicimbi yesikhumbuzo emayelana nokuqedwa kwengxibongo ukubika minyaka yonke kuWHO Executive Board kanye neWorld Health Assembly IHhovisi likaNobhala liphinde lihlanganise futhi lilawule uxhaso lwezimali lwalemsebenzi kanye nemicimbi yesikhashana njengoba kudingeka njengokubonisana kwezobuchwepheshe nokuqeqeshwa.

translations.source: Snakebite envenoming Overview: Snakebite envenoming is a potentially life-threatening disease caused by toxins in the bite of a venomous snake. Envenoming can also be caused by having venom sprayed into the eyes by certain species of snakes that have the ability to spit venom as a defence measure. Inadequate past efforts to control snakebite envenoming has produced fragmented, inaccurate epidemiological data. Many victims do not attend health centres or hospitals and instead rely on traditional treatments. However, available data show 4.5–5.4 million people get bitten by snakes annually. Of this, 1.8–2.7 million develop clinical illness and 81 000 to 138 000 die from complications. High-risk groups include rural agricultural workers, herders, fishermen, hunters, working children, people living in poorly constructed houses and those with limited access to education and healthcare. Morbidity and mortality occur most frequently among young people and children suffer higher case fatality. Furthermore, women experience increased barriers to accessing medical care in some cultures and pregnant women are extremely vulnerable. An ongoing crisis restricting access to safe, effective antivenom treatment in many regions, and particularly sub-Saharan Africa, is one factor that contributes to the predisposition for seeking help through traditional medicine. Symptoms: Bites or sprayed venom from venomous snakes can cause a range of acute and serious medical emergencies. Envenoming from different types of snakes can cause different symptoms, some more serious than others. This makes the preparation of correct antivenoms an ongoing problem. Envenoming can cause severe paralysis that may prevent breathing, making immediate medical attention critical. People may also experience bleeding disorders that can lead to fatal haemorrhages or irreversible kidney failure. Severe local tissue destruction may also occur, which can lead to permanent disability and even limb amputation. Children are at higher risk of severe effects due to lower body mass than adults. Most deaths and serious consequences from snake bites are entirely preventable by making safe and effective antivenoms more widely available and accessible, particularly in high-risk areas. High quality snake antivenoms are the only effective treatment to prevent or reverse most of the venomous effects of snake bites. Treatment: Snake antivenoms are effective treatments to prevent or reverse most of the harmful effects of snakebite envenoming and are included in the WHO list of essential medicines. The availability and accessibility of these antivenoms, along with raising awareness on primary prevention methods among communities and health workers, are the best ways to limit serious consequences and deaths from snakebite envenoming. After a bite by a snake suspected of being venomous, follow these steps: Immediately move away from the area where the bite occurred. Remove anything tight from around the bitten part of the body to avoid harm if swelling occurs.
translations.reference: ISnakebite envenoming Uhlolojikelele: iSnakebite envenoming yisifo esingase sibe yingozi empilweni esibangelwa ubuthi lapho elunywa inyoka enesihlungu. i-envenoming ingabangelwa futhi ukufuthwa ngobuthi emehlweni yizinhlobo ezithile zezinyoka ezikwazi ukukhafula ubuthi njengendlela yokuzivikela. Imizamo eyanele yesikhathi esidlule yokulawula ukusabalala kwenyoka ikhiqize idatha ehlukene, enganembile ye-epidemiological. Izisulu eziningi aziyi ezikhungweni zezempilo noma ezibhedlela kunalokho zithembele ekwelashweni kwesintu. Kodwa ke, imininingwane etholakalayo ikhombisa ukuthi abantu abayizigidi ezi-4.5–5.4 balunywa izinyoka minyaka yonke. Kulokhu, bangu-1.8-2.7 miliyoni abanesifo somtholampilo kanti abangu-81 000 kuya ku-138 000 bashona ngenxa yezinkinga. Amaqembu asengozini enkulu ahlanganisa abasebenzi bezolimo basezindaweni zasemakhaya, abelusi, abadobi, abazingeli, izingane ezisebenzayo, abantu abahlala ezindlini ezingakhiwe kahle kanye nalabo abangenayo imfundo nokunakekelwa kwezempilo okulinganiselwe. Ukugula nokufa kwenzeka kaningi phakathi kwentsha futhi izingane zisengozini enkulu yokufa. Ngaphezu kwalokho, abesifazane baba nezithiyo ezengeziwe zokuthola usizo lwezokwelapha kwamanye amasiko futhi abesifazane abakhulelwe basengozini enkulu. Inkinga eqhubekayo ekhawulela ukufinyelela ekwelashweni okuphephile, okusebenzayo kwe-antivenin ezifundeni eziningi, futhi ikakhulukazi iSub-Saharan Africa, ingenye yezinto ezinomthelela ekwakhekeni kokufuna usizo ngemithi yendabuko. Izimpawu: Ukulunywa noma isihlungu esifuthwe ezinyokaneni ezinobuthi kungabangela uchungechunge lwezimo eziphuthumayo ezibucayi nezibucayi. Ukutheleleka ezinhlotsheni ezihlukene zezinyoka kungabangela izimpawu ezihlukene, ezinye ezimbi kakhulu kunezinye. Lokhu kwenza ukulungiswa kwama-antivenin alungile kube inkinga eqhubekayo. I-envenoming ingabangela ukukhubazeka okukhulu okungase kuvimbele ukuphefumula, okwenza ukunakekelwa kwezokwelapha ngokushesha kube bucayi. Abantu bangase futhi babe nenkinga yokopha okungaholela ekopheni okubulalayo noma ukwehluleka kwezinso okungenakulungiseka. Ukucekelwa phansi okukhulu kwezicubu zendawo nakho kungase kwenzeke, okungaholela ekukhubazekeni unomphela ngisho nokunqunywa kwesitho. Izingane zisengozini enkulu yemiphumela emibi ngenxa yesisindo somzimba esiphansi kunabantu abadala. Ukufa okuningi kanye nemiphumela emibi ngenxa yokulunywa yizinyoka kungavinjelwa ngokuphelele ngokwenza ama-antivenin aphephile futhi asebenzayo atholakale kabanzi futhi afinyeleleke, ikakhulukazi ezindaweni ezisengozini enkulu. Izinqamuleli zezinyoka zekhwalithi ephezulu ukuphela kwendlela yokwelapha esebenzayo yokuvimbela noma ukubuyisela emuva iningi lemiphumela enobuthi yokulunywa yizinyoka. Ukwelashwa: Ama-antivenin enyoka ayizindlela zokwelapha ezisebenzayo zokuvimbela noma ukubuyisela emuva iningi lemiphumela eyingozi yokulunywa yinyoka futhi afakwe ohlwini lweWHO lwemithi ebalulekile. Ukutholakala kanye nokufinyeleleka kwalawa ma-antivenin, kanye nokuqwashisa ngezindlela eziyinhloko zokuvimbela phakathi kwemiphakathi kanye nabasebenzi bezempilo, izindlela ezingcono kakhulu zokukhawulela imiphumela emibi kanye nokufa okubangelwa yizinyoka. Ngemva kokulunywa yinyoka okusolakala ukuthi inobuthi, landela lezi zinyathelo: Suka ngokushesha endaweni lapho ukuluma kwenzeke khona. Susa noma yini eqinile endaweni elunywayo ukuze ugweme ukulimala uma kwenzeka ukuvuvukala.

Here's a translation of the provided document into Zulu.gs, aiming for clarity and accuracy while considering the limitations of the language model.  I've included explanations and notes after the translation to clarify choices made and potential areas for improvement.

**Zulu.gs Translation:**

Ukugqoka kungabangelwa futhi ngokuthi isinyamazane esithile esinamandla sokuchoma izinhliziyo ngesiqu, njengengxenye yokuzivikela. Imizamo yangaphambilini engaphezulu yokulawula ukugqoka kwizinyamazane yavelele iminye, futhi imininingwane yezifo ezingaphazanywa. Abaningi abasizi abavame ukuhambela izikhungo zezempilo noma izibhedlela, kodwa basebenzisa ukwelashwa kwendabuko. Kodwa imininingwane etholakalayo ikhombisa ukuthi abantu abangama-4.5–5.4 million bathathelwa izinyamazane minyaka yonke. Kulo, abantu abangama-1.8–2.7 million bathuthukisa ukugula okusebenzayo, futhi abantu abangama-81 000 kuya ku-138 000 bathola ukufa ngenxa yokulimazeka. Izinhloko eziphephile zihlanganisa abasebenzi bezolimo basezilwandle, abathwali, abaphengululi, abajwayelana, abantwana abasebenza, abantu abaphila emakhayeni aklawulwayo futhi labo abanokufinyelela okuncike kakhulu ekufundeni nokuphatheqile. Ukugula nokufa kwenzeka njalo phakathi kwabantu abasha, futhi abantwana bathola ukufa okukhulu. Ngaphezu kwalokho, abesifazane badinga ukuthola izivivinyo ezithuthukile zokufinyelela ekwelashweni medikal, futhi abafazi abalelayo bakhubazekile kakhulu. Inkinga ekhulayo ekhawuleza ukufinyelela ekwelashweni ekhethekile, esebenzayo, futhi evikelayo emakhanda amaningi, ikakhulukazi e-sub-Saharan Africa, iyisici esingabangela ukuthi abantu bathembele ekwelashweni kwendabuko. Izimpawu: Ukugqoka noma ukuchoma izinhliziyo ezivela ezinyamazaneni ezinokuba yingozi zingadala izimo eziphilile nezilawulekayo. Ukugqoka kwezinhlobo ezahlukene zezinyamazane kungadala izimpawu ezahlukene, ezinokuba yizinto eziphilile kunezinye. Lokhu kwenza ukulungiselela izivivinya ezifanele kube inkinga ekhulayo. Ukugqoka kungadala ukulimazeka okukhulu okungavumela ukuphefumula, okwenza ukunakekelwa kwesikhathi eside kubaluleke kakhulu. Abantu bangase bathole ukulimazeka kwegazi okungadala ukugula okuthile noma ukwehluleka kwesibeleko. Ukulimazeka kwesikhungo esikhulu kungase kusetshenziswe, okungadala ukulimazeka okukhulu noma ukususa ingxenye yomzimba. Abantwana bathola ingozi enkulu yokulimazeka okukhulu ngenxa yokuthi imiphimbo yabo yomzimba incike kakhulu kunabantu abadala. Kulo, ukufa nokulimazeka okuthile kwizinyamazane kungaphelwa ngokwenza izivivinya ezisebenza kahle zitholakale futhi zifaneleke kakhulu, ikakhulukazi ezindaweni eziphephile. Izivivinya ezisezingeni ephezulu ziziyilungiselela ukwelashwa kwazo ukukuvikela noma ukubuyisela imiphumela yezinyamazane. Ukwelashwa: Izivivinya zezinyamazane ziwelashwa ukukuvikela noma ukubuyisela imiphumela engalungile yokugqoka kwizinyamazane, futhi zifakiwe ohlu lwezempilo ze-WHO. Ukufinyelela nokuqonda lezi zivivinya, kanye nokukhuthaza izindlela zokuqala zokuqala phakathi komphakathi nabasebenzi bezempilo, yindlela enhle kakhulu yokunciphisa izinkinga nokufa kwizinyamazane. Ngemuva kokuchoma izinyamazane ezicenselwa ukuthi zinezinyamazane, landela lezi zinyathelo: Hamba kude lapho ukugqoka kwenzeka khona. Yeka noma yini ekhulu emzimbeni oqokiwe ukuvikelela ukulimazeka uma ukulimazeka kwenzeka.

**Notes and Explanations:**

*   **General Approach:** I've prioritized conveying the meaning accurately over a perfectly idiomatic translation. Zulu.gs is still under development, so aiming for natural-sounding phrasing can be challenging.
*   **Technical Terms:**  I've tried to use the most appropriate Zulu terms for medical and scientific vocabulary. Some terms might require further refinement by a medical professional familiar with Zulu.
*   **Numbers:** Numbers are generally translated directly.
*   **Sentence Structure:** I've attempted to maintain the original sentence structure as much as possible while ensuring grammatical correctness in Zulu.
*   **"Snakebite envenoming":** Translated as "Ukugqoka kwizinyamazane" (The poisoning by snakes). This is a common way to express the concept.
*   **"Antivenom":** Translated as "izivivinya zezinyamazane" (snake antivenoms).
*   **"High-risk groups":** Translated as "Izinhloko eziphephile" (High risk heads/groups).
*   **"Morbidity and mortality":** Translated as "Ukugula nokufa" (Sickness and death).
*   **"Sub-Saharan Africa":**  Translated as "e-sub-Saharan Africa" (in sub-Saharan Africa).
*   **"WHO list of essential medicines":** Translated as "ohlu lwezempilo ze-WHO" (WHO health list).
*   **"Immediate medical attention":** Translated as "ukwelashwa kwesikhathi eside" (long-term treatment).

**Potential Areas for Improvement:**

*   **Review by a Zulu Medical Professional:**  The most crucial step would be to have a Zulu-speaking medical professional review the translation for accuracy and appropriateness of terminology.
*   **Idiomatic Refinement:** A native Zulu speaker could help refine the phrasing to make it sound more natural and less literal.
*   **Contextual Adaptation:**  Consider the specific audience for this translation. If it's for a general audience, further simplification might be necessary. If it's for healthcare workers, more technical language might be appropriate.

translations.source: Reassure the victim, as most venomous snake bites do not cause immediate death. Immobilize the person completely and transport the person to a health facility as soon as possible Applying pressure at the bite site with a pressure pad may be suitable in some cases. Avoid traditional first aid methods or herbal medicines. Paracetamol may be given for local pain (which can be severe). Vomiting may occur, so place the person on their left side in the recovery position. Closely monitor airway and breathing and be ready to resuscitate if necessary
translations.reference: Qinisekisa isisulu, njengoba ukulunywa izinyoka eziningi ezinobuthi akubangeli ukufa ngokushesha. Misa umuntu ngokuphelele futhi umhambise esikhungweni sezempilo ngokushesha okukhulu Ukufaka ingcindezi endaweni yokuluma ngephedi yokucindezela kungase kulungele kwezinye izimo. Gwema izindlela zosizo lokuqala noma imithi yesintu. IParacetamol ingase inikezwe ubuhlungu bendawo (okungaba nzima kakhulu). Ukuhlanza kungase kwenzeke, ngakho ke beka umuntu ohlangothini lwakhe lwesobunxele endaweni yokululama. Gada eduze kwendlela yokuphefumula nokuphefumula futhi ulungele ukuvuselela uma kunesidingo

translations.source: Soil-transmitted helminthiases Overview: Soil-transmitted helminth (STH) infections are among the most common infections worldwide and affect the poorest and most deprived communities. They are transmitted by eggs present in human faeces which in turn contaminate soil in areas where sanitation is poor. The main species that infect people are the roundworm (Ascaris lumbricoides), the whipworm (Trichuris trichiura) and the hookworms (Necator americanus and Ancylostoma duodenale). Intestinal worms produce a wide range of symptoms including intestinal manifestations (diarrhoea, abdominal pain), general malaise and weakness. Hookworms cause chronic intestinal blood loss that result in anaemia. Soil-transmitted helminths are transmitted by eggs that are passed in the faeces of infected people. Adult worms live in the intestine where they produce thousands of eggs each day. In areas that lack adequate sanitation, these eggs contaminate the soil. This can happen in several ways: eggs that are attached to vegetables are ingested when the vegetables are not carefully cooked, washed or peeled; eggs are ingested from contaminated water sources; eggs are ingested by children who play in the contaminated soil and then put their hands in their mouths without washing them. Symptoms: Morbidity is related to the number of worms harboured. People with infections of light intensity (few worms) usually do not suffer from the infection. Heavier infections can cause a range of symptoms including intestinal manifestations (diarrhoea and abdominal pain), malnutrition, general malaise and weakness, and impaired growth and physical development. Infections of very high intensity can cause intestinal obstruction that should be treated surgically. S. stercoralis may cause dermatological and gastro-intestinal morbidity and is also known to be associated with chronic malnutrition in children. In case of reduced host immunity, the parasite can cause the hyperinfection/dissemination syndrome that is invariably fatal if not promptly and properly cured and is often fatal despite the treatment. In 2001, delegates at the World Health Assembly unanimously endorsed a resolution (WHA54.19) urging endemic countries to start seriously tackling worms, specifically schistosomiasis and soil-transmitted helminths. The strategy for control of soil-transmitted helminth infections is to control morbidity through the periodic treatment of at-risk people living in endemic areas. People at risk are: preschool children school-age children women of reproductive age (including pregnant women in the second and third trimesters and breastfeeding women) adults in certain high-risk occupations such as tea-pickers or miners.
translations.reference: IHelminthiases edluliselwa emhlabathini Uhlolojikelele: Ukutheleleka kweSoil-transmitted helminth (STH) kuphakathi kwezifo ezivame kakhulu emhlabeni wonke futhi kuthinta imiphakathi empofu kakhulu nentula kakhulu. Atheleleka ngamaqanda akhona endle yabantu abuye angcolise umhlabathi ezindaweni lapho ukuthuthwa kwendle kungalungile. Izinhlobo eziyinhloko ezithelela abantu izikelemu eziyindilinga (Ascaris lumbricoides), umswane (Trichuris trichiura) kanye nezikelemu (Necator americanus kanye ne-Ancylostoma duodenale). Izikelemu zamathumbu ziveza izimpawu eziningi ezihlanganisa ukuvela kwamathumbu (uhudo, ubuhlungu besisu), ukugula okujwayelekile kanye nokuba buthakathaka. Izikelemu zehookworms zidala ukulahleka kwegazi okungapheli emathunjini okuholela ku-anemia. Amahelminths adluliselwa emhlabathini asakazwa ngamaqanda adluliselwa endle yabantu abanaleli gciwane. Izikelemu zabantu abadala zihlala emathunjini lapho zikhiqiza izinkulungwane zamaqanda usuku ngalunye. Ezindaweni ezingenazo izindlu zokukhucululwa kwendle ezanele, la maqanda angcolisa umhlabathi. Lokhu kungenzeka ngezindlela eziningi: amaqanda ahlanganiswe nemifino adliwa lapho imifino ingaphekwa ngokucophelela, igezwe noma ingahlutshiwe; amaqanda adliwa emithonjeni yamanzi angcolile; amaqanda adliwa yizingane ezidlala emhlabathini onamagciwane bese zifaka izandla emlonyeni zingawagezi. Izimpawu: Ukugula kuhlobene nenani lezikelemu ezihlala echwebeni. Abantu abanezifo zokuqina kokukhanya (izikelemu ezimbalwa) ngokuvamile abaphathwa yilesi sifo. Ukutheleleka okunzima kakhulu kungabangela izinhlobonhlobo zezimpawu ezihlanganisa ukuvela kwamathumbu (uhudo nobuhlungu besisu), ukungondleki, ukugula okujwayelekile kanye nokuba buthakathaka, kanye nokukhubazeka kokukhula nokukhula komzimba. Amagciwane anamandla aphezulu kakhulu angabangela ukuvinjelwa kwamathumbu okufanele aphathwe ngokuhlinzwa. I-S. stercoralis ingase ibangele izifo zesikhumba kanye negastro-intestinal futhi yaziwa nangokuthi ihlotshaniswa nokungondleki okungapheli ezinganeni. Esimeni sokuncipha kokuzivikela komzimba, iparasite ingabangela ihyperinfection/dissemination syndrome ehlala ibulala uma ingelapheki ngokushesha nangendlela efanele futhi ngokuvamile ebulalayo naphezu kokwelashwa. Ngo-2001, izihambeli zoMhlangano Wezempilo Womhlaba wonke zavumelana ngazwi linye isinqumo (WHA54.19) esinxusa amazwe anesifo esiwumqedazwe ukuthi aqale ukulwa nezikelemu, ikakhulukazi isifo sohudo kanye ne-helminths edluliselwa emhlabathini. Isu lokulawula izifo ze-helminth ezidluliselwa emhlabathini ukulawula izifo ngokwelashwa ngezikhathi ezithile kwabantu abasengozini abahlala ezindaweni ezihlala njalo. Abantu abasengozini yilaba: izingane zasenkulisa izingane zesikole abesifazane abaneminyaka yobudala yokuzala (kuhlanganise nabesifazane abakhulelwe ku-trimester yesibili neyesithathu kanye nabesifazane abancelisayo) abantu abadala emisebenzini ethile engcuphe kakhulu njengabacoshi betiye noma abavukuzi.

Zitholakala ngezinhlabelelo ezifihla emuva kwemithombo yezifo, ehlanganiswe emhlabathini lapho ukuhlanza kusemntambo. Izinhlobo eziyinhloko ezidlula emzimbeni abantu zihlanganisa igubu elinde (Ascaris lumbricoides), igubu eliqonde (Trichuris trichiura) kanye nezihlabelelo (Necator americanus kanye ne-Ancylostoma duodenale). Izindlu zemvelo zikhiqiza izimpawu ezihlukahlukene, okuhlanganisa izimpawu zokugaya (ukugaya, ubuhlungu be-abdominal), ukuhluleka kahle nokuthintilana. Izihlabelelo zibangela ukulahleka kwegazi kwegazi elingavamile, okuthola umphumela we-anaemia. Izindlu zemvelo zitholakala ngezinhlabelelo ezihambiswayo emuva kwemithombo yezifo. Izindlu zemvelo zihlala emgodini lapho zikhiqiza izinkulungwane zezinhlabelelo nsuku zonke. Lapho kutholakala ukuntshontshwa kwesihlanzimvelo, lezi zinhlabelelo zihlanganiswe emhlabathini. Lokhu kungenzeka ngezindlela eziningi: izinhlabelelo ezihambiswayo kwiimfuno zidlulwa lapho imfundo ingacutshungulwa kahle, washwa noma isuswe; izinhlabelelo zidlulwa emithonjeni yamanzi; izinhlabelelo zidlulwa ngabantana abathatha imi ngokwesiko futhi ngemuva kwalo, babeka izandla emzimbeni wabo ngaphandle kokuzama. translations.source: TreatmentThe WHO recommended medicines –albendazole (400 mg) and mebendazole (500 mg) – are effective, inexpensive and easy to administer by non-medical personnel (e.g. teachers). They have been through extensive safety testing and have been used in millions of people with few and minor side-effects. Both albendazole and mebendazole are donated to national ministries of health through WHO in all endemic countries for the treatment of all children of school age. Ivermectin for the control of S. stercoralis is expected to be available at affordable price from 2021.
translations.reference: UkwelashwaImithi etuswa yiWHO – i-albendazole (400 mg) kanye ne-mebendazole (500 mg) – iyasebenza, ayibizi futhi kulula ukuyinikezwa yizisebenzi ezingezona ezokwelashwa (isb. othisha). Adlule ekuhlolweni okubanzi kokuphepha futhi asetshenziswe ezigidini zabantu abanemiphumela engemihle embalwa noma emincane. Kokubili i-albendazole ne-mebendazole inikelwa ezindlini zezempilo zikazwelonke ngeWHO kuwo wonke amazwe anesifo ukuze zelashwe zonke izingane ezisafunda. I-Ivermectin yokulawula kwe-S. stercoralis kulindeleke ukuthi itholakale ngentengo ethengekayo kusukela ngo-2021.
translations.hypothesis:
Here's the translation of the provided English text into Zulu.gs, aiming for clarity and accuracy within the constraints of the language:

**Ukwelashwa**

Izinyango zokwelashwa ezihlonzwane yi-WHO – i-albendazole (400 mg) kanye ne-mebendazole (500 mg) – ziyasebenza, zishibhile futhi ziqhekeka kalula abantu abangochwiri. (Ngokwesibonelo, othisha.) Zihloliwe ngokujwayelekile ngokuqinisekisa ukuthi ziphephile futhi zisetshenziswe kubantu abazimbalwa kakhulu nokuphazanyiswa okuncane. I-albendazole ne-mebendazole zihlonishwa ezinyangeni zezempilo zezizwe ngaphesheya nge-WHO emazweni onke anelela ukwelashwa kwabantwana basekholeji. Kukhonjwa ukuthi i-Ivermectin yokulawula i-S. stercoralis izotholakala ngentengo engokwanele kusukela 2021.

**Explanation of Choices & Considerations:**

*   **Terminology:** I've used established Zulu terms where possible for medical terms like "albendazole" and "mebendazole."  It's common to retain the original names in these cases, especially when dealing with specific medications.
*   **Clarity:** I've prioritized clear and understandable language.
*   **"Non-medical personnel":** Translated as "abantu abangochwiri" (people who are not doctors/healthcare workers).
*   **"Endemic countries":** Translated as "emazweni onke anelela" (in all countries where it is prevalent).
*   **"School age":** Translated as "abantwana basekholeji" (school children).
*   **"Affordable price":** Translated as "ngentengo engokwanele" (at a sufficient/reasonable price).

**Important Notes about Zulu.gs:**

*   **Limited Resources:** Zulu.gs is a developing language model.  The quality of translation can vary.
*   **Context is Key:**  For highly technical or nuanced documents, a human translator with expertise in both English and Zulu is *always* recommended.
*   **Review:**  It's crucial to have a native Zulu speaker review the translation for accuracy and naturalness.

translations.source: Stillbirth Overview: A baby who dies after 28 weeks of pregnancy, but before or during birth, is classified as a stillbirth.There are nearly 2 million stillbirths every year – one every 16 seconds. Over 40% of all stillbirths occur during labour – a loss that could be avoided with improved quality and respectful care during childbirth including routine monitoring and timely access to emergency obstetric care when required. Experiencing a stillbirth during pregnancy or childbirth is a tragedy insufficiently addressed in global agendas, policies and funded programmes. There are psychological costs, especially to women and their families, such as maternal depression, financial consequences and economic repercussions, as well as stigma and taboo.In 2014, the World Health Assembly endorsed the Every Newborn Action Plan (ENAP), which includes a global target of 12 or fewer third trimester (late) stillbirths per 1,000 total births in every country by 2030. In 2021, 139 mainly high-income and upper middle-income countries had met this target, but 56 countries will not each the ENAP target by 2030 if further efforts are not made. If current trends continue, 15.9 million babies will be stillborn; nearly half of these (7.7 million, 48%) will occur in sub-Saharan Africa. Causes: With quality health care throughout pregnancy and childbirth, most stillbirths are preventable. The major causes of stillbirth include pregnancy and childbirth-related complications, prolonged pregnancy, maternal infections such as malaria, syphilis and HIV, maternal conditions especially hypertension, and diabetes, and fetal growth restriction (when an unborn baby is unable to achieve its growth potential and therefore smaller than it should be). Congenital abnormalities are responsible for less than 10% of stillbirths reported nationally in high-income countries and the exact proportion in low-income settings is unknown due to limitations in diagnostics. Factors related to age of the mother and practicing smoking can also increase the risk of maternal disease and stillbirth. Stillbirths can be prevented through family planning to avoid unwanted pregnancies, good health and nutrition prior to and during pregnancy, quality and respectful antenatal and childbirth care including adequate skilled health personnel including midwives. Syphilis treatment in pregnancy could also prevent an estimated 200 000 stillbirths, while fetal heart rate monitoring and labour surveillance and prompt interventions when needed are crucial for preventing 832 000 intrapartum stillbirths and reducing neonatal deaths. Stillbirths are strongly linked to adverse social and economic determinants of health. Prevention and responsive care need to be integrated across the continuum of maternal health care, and beyond. This includes respectful and supportive care in the event of a death. Listening to the experiences and voices of women and their communities is essential to help address issues of stigma associated with stillbirth. WHO response: More needs to be done to integrate stillbirth prevention within global and national agendas for high quality health care for women, adolescents, and babies. Through the Global Strategy for Women's, Children's and Adolescents Health 2016–2030 and implementing the recommendations of the Every Newborn Action Plan (2014), WHO is working to end preventable stillbirths, as part of efforts to improve maternal, newborn, child and adolescent health. Most stillbirths do not receive a birth certificate and are not registered. Improving systems for reporting births and neonatal deaths is a matter of human rights and a prerequisite for reducing stillbirths. In addition, there is a need to strengthen routine health information systems to accurately capture and report stillbirths for monitoring and improving the quality of care. WHO provides tools to help countries improve their data on both stillbirths and neonatal deaths. WHO also has guidance to help countries review and investigate individual deaths so they can recommend and implement solutions to prevent similar ones in the future and a standard classification system for perinatal deaths (ICD-PM). WHO and UNICEF are supporting a call for collective action to end preventable stillbirths by:
translations.reference: Ukubeletha umtwana oseshonile Uhlolojikelele: Ingane eshona ngemva kwamasonto angu-28 ekhulelwe, kodwa ngaphambi noma ngesikhathi sokuzalwa, ibhekwa njengokuzalwa ishonile. Cishe kunabantwana abazalwa beshonile ababalelwa ezigidini ezi-2 minyaka yonke - olulodwa njalo ngemizuzwana eyi-16. Ngaphezu kwama-40% akho konke ukubeletha kwenzeka ngesikhathi sokubeletha - ukulahlekelwa okungagwenywa ngekhwalithi ethuthukisiwe nokunakekelwa okuhloniphekile ngesikhathi sokubeletha okuhlanganisa ukuqapha okujwayelekile kanye nokufinyelela ngesikhathi ekunakekelweni okuphuthumayo uma kudingeka. Ukuthola umntwana oshonile ngesikhathi sokukhulelwa noma ebeletha kuyinhlekelele engasingathwanga ngokwanele kuma-ajenda omhlaba, izinqubomgomo nezinhlelo ezixhaswa ngemali. Kunezindleko ezingokwengqondo, ikakhulukazi kwabesifazane nemindeni yabo, njengokudangala komama, imiphumela yezezimali kanye nemiphumela yezomnotho, kanye nokucwaswa kanye nokungamukeleki. okuhlosiwe emhlabeni wonke kwabantwana abazalwa beshonile abayi-12 noma ngaphansi kwekota yesithathu (sekwephuzile) kubantwana abayi-1,000 sebephelele kuwo wonke amazwe ngo-2030. Ngo-2021, amazwe angu-139 ikakhulukazi anemali engenayo ephezulu kanye naphezulu anemali engenayo emaphakathi ayefinyelele lokhu kuhlosiwe, kodwa amazwe angu-56 ngeke ngalinye libe nethagethi ye-ENAP ngo-2030 uma ingenziwa eminye imizamo. Uma izimo zamanje ziqhubeka, izingane eziyizigidi ezingu-15.9 zizozalwa zishonile; cishe isigamu salokhu (izigidi ezingu-7.7, 48%) zizokwenzeka eSub-Saharan Africa. Izimbangela: Ngokunakekelwa kwezempilo okuseqophelweni lonke ngesikhathi sokukhulelwa kanye nokubeletha, ukubeletha okuningi kuyagwemeka. Izimbangela eziyinhloko zokubeletha ingane eshonile zihlanganisa izinkinga eziphathelene nokukhulelwa nokubeletha, ukukhulelwa isikhathi eside, izifo zikamama ezinjengomalaleveva, ugcunsula kanye ne-HIV, izimo zomama ikakhulukazi umfutho wegazi ophakeme, nesifo sikashukela, kanye nokuvinjelwa ukukhula kombungu (lapho usana olungakazalwa lungakwazi ukufinyelela amandla ayo okukhula ngakho ke kuncane kunalokho obekufanele kube yikona). Ukungajwayelekile kokuzalwa kuyimbangela engaphansi kuka-10% yezingane ezizalwa zishonile ezibikwe kuzwelonke emazweni anemali engenayo ephezulu futhi ingxenye yangempela yezilungiselelo zabantu abahola kancane ayaziwa ngenxa yemikhawulo ekuxilongweni. Izinto ezihlobene nobudala bukamama nokuzijwayeza ukubhema nakho kungandisa ingozi yesifo sikamama kanye nokubeletha. Ukubeletha kungavinjelwa ngokuhlela umndeni ukuze kugwenywe ukukhulelwa okungafunwa, impilo enhle kanye nokudla okunomsoco ngaphambi nangesikhathi sokukhulelwa, ukunakekelwa kwekhwalithi nenhlonipho ngesikhathi sokubeletha kanye nokubeletha okuhlanganisa nabasebenzi bezempilo abaqeqeshiwe abafanelekayo kuhlanganise nababelethisi. Ukwelashwa ngogcunsula ekukhulelweni kungase futhi kuvimbele ukubeletha okulinganiselwa ku-200 000, kuyilapho ukuqapha izinga lokushaya kwenhliziyo yengane kanye nokugadwa komsebenzi kanye nokungenelela ngokushesha lapho kudingeka kubalulekile ekuvimbeleni ukubeletha okungama-832 000 phakathi kokubeletha kanye nokunciphisa ukufa kwezingane ezisanda kuzalwa. Ukubeletha kuxhumene kakhulu nezinqumo ezingezinhle zezenhlalo nezomnotho zezempilo. Ukuvimbela nokunakekelwa okusabelayo kufanele kuhlanganiswe ekunakekelweni kwezempilo komama, nangale kwalokho. Lokhu kuhlanganisa ukunakekelwa ngenhlonipho nokusekela uma kwenzeka ushona. Ukulalela okwenzekayo kanye namazwi abantu besifazane nemiphakathi yabo kubalulekile ukusiza ukubhekana nezinkinga zokucwaswa okuhambisana nokuzala umntwana oshonile. Impendulo yeWHO: Kuningi okudingeka kwenziwe ukuze kuhlanganiswe ukuvimbela ukubeletha phakathi kwe-ajenda yomhlaba wonke neyezwe yokunakekelwa kwezempilo okusezingeni eliphezulu kwabesifazane, intsha, kanye nezingane. Ngesu Lomhlaba Wonke Lezempilo Zabesifazane, Zezingane kanye Nentsha 2016–2030 nokusebenzisa izincomo ze-All Newborn Action Plan (2014), iWHO isebenzela ukuqeda ukubeletha okungavinjelwa, njengengxenye yemizamo yokuthuthukisa impilo kamama, usana, ingane kanye nentsha. Iningi lalabo abazalwa beshonile abazitholi izincwadi zokuzalwa futhi ababhalisiwe. Ukwenza ngcono izinhlelo zokubika ukuzalwa kanye nokufa kwezingane ezisanda kuzalwa kuyindaba yamalungelo abantu kanye nemfuneko yokunciphisa ukubeletha. Ukwengeza, kunesidingo sokuqinisa izinhlelo zolwazi lwezempilo olujwayelekile ukuze kuthathwe ngokunembile futhi kubikwe izingane ezizalwa zishonile ukuze kuqashwe futhi kwenziwe ngcono izinga lokunakekelwa. IWHO ihlinzeka ngamathuluzi okusiza amazwe ukuthi athuthukise idatha yawo kukho kokubili ukubeletha nokufa kwezingane ezisanda kuzalwa. IWHO futhi inesiqondiso sokusiza amazwe ukuthi abuyekeze futhi aphenye ukufa komuntu ngamunye ukuze akwazi ukuncoma futhi asebenzise izixazululo zokuvimbela okufanayo esikhathini esizayo kanye nohlelo olujwayelekile lokuhlukanisa ukufa kokubeletha (ICD-PM). IWHO kanye ne-UNICEF bayaseseka ikhwelo lokuthi kuthathwe izinyathelo ezihlangene zokuqeda ukubeletha okungavinjelwa ngokuthi:
translations.hypothesis:
Okay, here's a translation of the provided document into Zulu.gs, aiming for clarity and accuracy while considering the nuances of the language.  I'll include explanations and notes after the translation to clarify some choices and potential areas for further refinement.

**Zulu.gs Translation:**

**Ukubuyekezwa Kokugulukiswa Kwengane (Stillbirth Overview):** Ingane eyashona ngemva kwamajwi angu-28 entathu, kodwa ngaphambi noma ngesikhathi sokubeletha, iklasifiyelwa njengengane eyagulukiswa. Kunezingane ezingamakhulu ayisikhombisa amabili ezigulukiswa minyaka yonke – ingane nganye emayeleni ayisishiyagalombili.  Ngaphezu kuka-40% zonke izigulukiswa zenzeka ngesikhathi sokubeletha – ukulahleka okungalimaziwa ngokuthuthukisa ikhwalithi nokunakekelwa okuhlonipha ngesikhathi sokubeletha, okuhlanganisa ukugada okujwayelekile nokufinyelela ngokushesha ekwelaphekeni kwe-obstetric emergency uma kudingeka. Ukuhlangenela ngokugulukiswa kwengane ngesifazane noma ngesikhathi sokubeletha kuyisigameko esingesihle kangaka esingakhethwa njalo ezinhlelweni zezwe, imiyalelo nemikhakha egunyazwe. Kunezindleko ngokomoya, ikakhulu kubafazi nemindeni yabo, ezifana nokudela kwabafazi, imiphumela yezezimali nemiphumela yezomnotho, kanye nokuqapha nokuthulelana.

Ngo-2014, i-World Health Assembly yamukelela i-Every Newborn Action Plan (ENAP), equkethe umgomo wezwe wonke wokuba ngezingu-12 noma ngaphansi kwezingu-12 izigulukiswa zentathu entshimini (ngaphezu) ngamakhulu ayizinkulungwane ezinkulu zokubeletha njalo, kuzo zonke izifundazwe ngom-2030. Ngo-2021, izifundazwe ezingu-139, ikakhulu ezinzima nasezephethelo eziphezulu, zafinyelele lo mgomo, kodwa izifundazwe ezingu-56 ngeke zifeze umgomo we-ENAP ngom-2030 uma imizamo eyengeziwe ingenziwa. Uma izintandardeni zanjalo ziqukuzalwa, izigulukiswa ezingu-15.9 million zizoba khona; cishe ingxenye yalezi (7.7 million, 48%) zizoba khona e-sub-Saharan Africa.

**Imisebenzi:** Ngokunakekelwa kwempilo ekukhethekile ngaphambi nangemva kokubeletha, izigulukiswa ziningi zinganqanyulwa. Imisebenzi emikhulu yokugulukiswa kwengane iqukethe izinkinga ezihlobene nemalimini nokubeletha, ukubeletha okwedlule, ukugugulela kwabafazi njenge-malaria, syphilis ne-HIV, izimo zabafazi ikakhulu i-hypertension ne-diabetes, kanye nokuncibilika kwengane (lapho ingane engakabizwa kancane ingakwazi ukufinyelela ekutholeni ukukhula kwakhe futhi ngaleyo ndlela ibe ngaphansi kwesimo esifanele). Izinto ezisemzimbeni zibhekwa njengengxenye engaphansi kwe-10% yezigulukiswa ezibhalwe ezifundazweni eziphezulu futhi inani eliqondile ezindaweni eziphansi zempilo lingaziwa ngenxa yokuthi ukuxilongwa kuthintekayo. Izinto ezihlobene neminyaka yabafazi nokuzama ukutshala uthupha zingaphakamisa futhi umngamo wezifo zabafazi nezigulukiswa. Izigulukiswa zingakuncintisana ngokuhlelwa kwemvelo ukugwema ukukhulelwa okungafuneki, impilo nokudla okuhle ngaphambi nangemva kokukhulelwa, ukunakekelwa kwabafazi okuhlonipha nokukhethekile okuhlanganisa abasebenzi bezempilo abanekhono abanezinhlelo ezifana ne-midwives. Ukwelashwa kwe-syphilis ngesifazane kungakwazi ukukuncintisana ngamakhulu ayisithupha ezigulukiswa, kuyilapho ukugada intaba yomoya wezinhliziyo kanye nokugada ukubeletha nokuthola izixazululo lapho kudingeka khona kubaluleke kakhulu ekuncintiseni izigulukiswa ezingu-832 000 ezingaphakathi kokubeletha nokuncintisana izifo zezingane ezincane. Izigulukiswa zihlobane kakhulu nezimo eziphathisa umoya nezomnotho. Ukukuncintisana nokunakekelwa okutholakalayo kufanele kuhlanganiswe kuwo wonke umkhuba wokunakekelwa kwabafazi, futhi ngaphe. Lokhu kubandakanya ukunakekelwa okuhlonipha nokusekela ngesikhathi sokufa. Ukulalela izifundo nemizwa yabafazi nemiphakathi yabo kubaluleke kakhulu ekuxazululeni izinkinga ezihlobene nokugulukiswa kwengane.

**Impendulo ye-WHO:** Kufanele kwenziwe okuningi ukuhlanganisa ukukuncintisana kwengane ngaphakathi kwemigomo yezwe nemikhakha yezwe yokunakekelwa kwempilo ekukhethekile kubafazi, abasha kanye nezinyane. Ngalokhu, i-WHO iyazama ukukuncintisana izigulukiswa ezingakuncintisani, njengengxenye yomzamo wokuthuthukisa impilo yabazali, izinyane kanye nezinyane. Izigulukiswa ziningi azitholi izimembo zokubeletha futhi azibhaliswi. Ukuthuthukisa izinhlelo zokubhalisa izimembo nokufa kwezinyane kubaluleke njengomthetho womuntu nokukuncintisana izigulukiswa. I-WHO inikeza amathuluzi ukusiza izifundazwe ukuthuthukisa idatha yazo ngokubhalisa izigulukiswa nezifo zezingane ezincane. I-WHO inikeza nesikhulu sokusiza izifundazwe ukuhlolwa nokuhlola izifo zokufa ngamanye, ukuze zikwazi ukukhipha izixazululo zokukuncintisana izifo ezifanayo esikhathini esizayo kanye nohlelo olusemthethweni lokuklasifika izifo zokubeletha (ICD-PM). translations.source: Substandard and falsified medical products Overview: Up to two billion people around the world lack access to necessary medicines, vaccines, medical devices including in vitro diagnostics, and other health products, which creates a vacuum that is too often filled by substandard and falsified products. This problem is growing as global supply chains become more complex, meaning products manufactured in one country may be packaged in a second country and distributed across borders to be marketed or sold to consumers in a third. The growth of e-commerce also contributes to this trend by making it easier to purchase medicines online, often from unauthorized sources. WHO has identified this issue one of the urgent health challenges for the next decade given that more than one in ten medicines in low- and middle-income countries are estimated to be substandard or falsified. No country remains untouched from this issue, and WHO has received reports of substandard or falsified medical medicines, vaccines and in vitro diagnostics from all regions of the world. Both generic and innovator medicines can be falsified, ranging from very expensive products for cancer to very inexpensive products for treatment of pain. WHO Member States have agreed on a comprehensive global strategy focused on prevention, detection and response to move towards achieving increased access to quality, safe, effective and quality medical products. Impact: Substandard and falsified medical products create many problems for both the individual taking the medicine and for families, the larger society, health care system and supply chain. When medicines do not work the way they should, they can fail to treat or prevent disease, contribute to antimicrobial resistance, waste precious resources and lead to a loss of confidence in medicines and distrust of healthcare providers. This can have a negative socioeconomic impact, contributing to related loss in productivity and adding expenses to the individual and national health system. They are most likely to reach patients in situations where there is constrained access to quality and safe medical products, poor governance and weak technical capacity. Although this issue impacts all countries, countries where there are weak or non-existent regulatory systems bear the greatest burden of substandard and falsified medical products. In an increasingly globalized world, no one country has sufficient resources and capacity to deal with this issue in isolation. Through global systems and processes such as the WHO Global Surveillance and Monitoring System and WHO Member State Mechanism, Member States are working together to prevent, detect and respond to substandard and falsified medical products.
translations.reference: Imikhiqizo yezokwelapha esezingeni eliphansi futhi engamanga Uhlolojikelele: Abantu abangafika ezigidini eziyizinkulungwane ezimbili emhlabeni jikelele abanakho ukufinyelela emithini edingekayo, imigomo, izinsiza zezokwelapha ezihlanganisa ukuxilongwa kwe-in vitro, neminye imikhiqizo yezempilo, okudala isikhala esivamise ukugcwaliswa ngemikhiqizo esezingeni eliphansi nengamanga. Le nkinga iyakhula njengoba amaketanga okuhlinzeka emhlabeni wonke eba yinkimbinkimbi, okusho ukuthi imikhiqizo ekhiqizwa ezweni elilodwa ingase ihlanganiswe ezweni lesibili futhi isatshalaliswe emingceleni ukuze idayiswe noma ithengiswe kubathengi ngengxenye yesithathu. Ukukhula kwe-e-commerce nakho kunomthelela kulo mkhuba ngokwenza kube lula ukuthenga imithi ku-inthanethi, ngokuvamile ivela emithonjeni engagunyaziwe. IWHO ihlonze lolu daba njengenye yezinselelo eziphuthumayo zezempilo kule minyaka eyishumi ezayo uma kubhekwa ukuthi imithi engaphezu kowodwa kweyishumi emazweni anemali engenayo ephansi noma ephakathi ilinganiselwa ukuthi isezingeni eliphansi noma engamanga. Alikho izwe elihlala lingakathintwa kulolu daba, futhi iWHO ithole imibiko yemithi yezokwelapha esezingeni eliphansi noma engamanga, imigomo kanye nokuxilongwa kwe-in vitro okuvela kuzo zonke izifunda zomhlaba. Yomibili imithi ejwayelekile kanye nentsha ingenziwa amanga, kusukela emikhiqizweni ebiza kakhulu yomdlavuza kuye emikhiqizweni engabizi kakhulu yokwelapha izinhlungu. Amazwe Angamalungu eWHO avumelene ngesu eliphelele lomhlaba wonke eligxile ekuvimbeleni, ekuhlonzeni nasekuphenduleni ukuze kufinyeleleke ekufinyeleleni okunyukile emikhiqizweni yezokwelapha esezingeni eliphezulu, ephephile, ephumelelayo nesezingeni eliphezulu. Umthelela: Imikhiqizo yezokwelapha esezingeni eliphansi nengamanga idala izinkinga eziningi kubo bobabili umuntu ophuza umuthi kanye nemindeni, umphakathi omkhulu, uhlelo lokunakekelwa kwezempilo kanye nochungechunge lokuhlinzeka. Uma imithi ingasebenzi ngendlela okufanele isebenze ngayo, ingahluleka ukwelapha noma ukuvimbela izifo, ibe nomthelela ekwandeni kwemithi elwa namagciwane, imoshe izinsiza eziyigugu futhi iholele ekulahlekelweni ukuzethemba emithini kanye nokungathembani abahlinzeki bezempilo. Lokhu kungaba nomthelela omubi kwezenhlalo-mnotho, kube nomthelela ekulahlekeni okuhlobene nokukhiqiza kanye nokwengeza izindleko ohlelweni lwezempilo lomuntu ngamunye kanye nolwezwe lonke. Kungenzeka kakhulu ukuthi bafinyelele iziguli ezimeni lapho kunokuvinjelwa ukufinyelela emikhiqizweni yezokwelapha esezingeni eliphezulu nephephile, ukubusa okungekuhle kanye namandla obuchwepheshe abuthakathaka. Nakuba le nkinga ithinta wonke amazwe, amazwe lapho kunezinhlelo zokulawula ezibuthaka noma ezingekho khona anomthwalo omkhulu wemikhiqizo yezokwelapha esezingeni eliphansi nengamanga. Emhlabeni owandayo womhlaba wonke, alikho izwe elinezinsiza ezanele namandla okubhekana nalolu daba lilodwa. Ngezinhlelo nezinqubo zomhlaba wonke ezifana neWHO Global Surveillance and Monitoring System kanye neWHO Member State Mechanism, Amazwe Angamalungu asebenzisana ukuze avimbele, ahlonze futhi aphendule emikhiqizweni yezokwelapha esezingeni eliphansi nengamanga.

translations.source: Suicide prevention Overview: More than 700 000 people die by suicide every year. For each suicide, there are an estimated more than 20 suicide attempts. Suicide can occur at any stage of life and in all regions of the world. In 2019, suicide was the fourth leading cause of death among 15–29-year-olds globally, and 77% of all suicides happened in low- and middle-income countries. Almost 20% of global suicides were due to pesticide self-poisoning. While the link between suicide and mental health conditions (in particular, depression and alcohol use disorders) and a previous suicide attempt is well established in high-income countries, many suicides happen impulsively in moments of crisis. Further risk factors for suicide include experience of loss, loneliness, discrimination, a relationship break-up, financial problems, chronic pain and illness, violence, abuse, and conflict or other humanitarian emergencies. Stigma around mental health conditions and suicide means many people thinking about suicide do not seek help. Suicides and suicide attempts have a ripple effect that impacts on families, friends, colleagues, communities and societies. Suicide: facts and figures globally Suicide worldwide in 2019 report LIVE LIFE: an implementation guide for suicide prevention in countries Prevention: Much can be done at individual, community and national levels to prevent suicide and suicide attempts. WHO’s LIVE LIFE approach recommends four effective, evidence-based key interventions which should be included in every national response to suicide: limit access to the means of suicide interact with the media for responsible reporting of suicide foster socio-emotional life skills in adolescents early identify, assess, manage and follow up anyone who is affected by suicidal behaviours. The foundational pillars of the interventions are situation analysis, multisectoral collaboration, awareness raising, capacity building, financing, surveillance, monitoring and evaluation. Suicide prevention efforts require coordination and collaboration among multiple sectors, including health, education, labour, agriculture, business, justice, law, defence, politics and the media. Suicide prevention is often not adequately addressed because of stigma and lack of awareness that suicide is a major public health problem. Communities also play a crucial role in preventing suicide. The WHO community engagement toolkit guides communities in identifying priorities and implementing activities according to local contexts. WHO response: The urgency to act to prevent suicides has been recognized and prioritized at the highest levels.
translations.reference: Ukuvimbela ukuzibulala Uhlolojikelele: Bangaphezu kuka-700 000 abantu abafa ngokuzibulala minyaka yonke. Ngokuzibulala ngakunye, kulinganiselwa ukuthi kunemizamo yokuzibulala engaphezu kuka-20. Ukuzibulala kungenzeka kunoma yisiphi isigaba sempilo nakuzo zonke izifunda zomhlaba. Ngo-2019, ukuzibulala bekuyimbangela yesine yokufa kwabantu abaneminyaka engu-15-29 emhlabeni jikelele, kanti u-77% wabo bonke abantu abazibulalayo kwenzeka emazweni anemali engenayo ephansi naphakathi. Cishe u-20% wabantu abazibulalayo emhlabeni wonke ngenxa yokuzifaka ubuthi ngesibulala-zinambuzane. Nakuba ukuxhumana phakathi kokuzibulala kanye nezimo zempilo yengqondo (ikakhulukazi, ukudangala nokuphazamiseka kokusetshenziswa kotshwala) kanye nomzamo wangaphambilini wokuzibulala kusungulwe kahle emazweni anemali engenayo ephezulu, ukuzibulala okuningi kwenzeka ngokuxhamazela ezikhathini zobunzima. Ezinye izici eziyingozi zokuzibulala zihlanganisa isipiliyoni sokulahlekelwa, isizungu, ukubandlululwa, ukuhlukana kobudlelwane, izinkinga zezimali, ubuhlungu obungapheli nokugula, udlame, ukuhlukumeza, nezingxabano noma ezinye izimo eziphuthumayo zobuntu. Ukucwaswa okuhambisana nezimo zempilo yengqondo nokuzibulala kusho ukuthi abantu abaningi abacabanga ngokuzibulala abalufuni usizo. Ukuzibulala nemizamo yokuzibulala inomthelela omubi othinta imindeni, abangani, ozakwethu, imiphakathi kanye nemiphakathi. Ukuzibulala: amaqiniso nezibalo emhlabeni jikelele Ukuzibulala emhlabeni wonke kubikwa ngo-2019 LIVE LIFE: umhlahlandlela wokuqalisa wokuvimbela ukuzibulala emazweni Ukuvimbela: Kuningi okungenziwa ezingeni lomuntu ngamunye, emphakathini kanye nakuzwelonke ukuvimbela ukuzibulala kanye nemizamo yokuzibulala. Indlela yeWHO's LIVE LIFE incoma ukungenelela okune okusebenzayo, okusekelwe ebufakazini okufanele kufakwe kuzo zonke izimpendulo zezwe zokuzibulala: nciphisa ukufinyelela ezindleleni zokuzibulala xhumana nabezindaba ngokubika ngokuzibulala thuthukisa amakhono empilo yezenhlalo nemizwa entsheni bona kusenesikhathi, ahlole, aphathe futhi alandelele noma ubani othintwa imikhuba yokuzibulala. Izinsika eziyisisekelo zalokhu kungenelela wukuhlaziya isimo, ukusebenzisana kwezinhlaka eziningi, ukuqwashisa, ukuhlonyiswa ngamakhono, ukuxhasa ngezimali, ukugadwa, ukuqapha kanye nokuhlola. Imizamo yokuvimbela ukuzibulala idinga ukubambisana nokusebenzisana phakathi kwemikhakha eminingi, okuhlanganisa ezempilo, imfundo, abasebenzi, ezolimo, ibhizinisi, ubulungiswa, umthetho, ukuvikela, ezombusazwe kanye nabezindaba. Ukuvimbela ukuzibulala ngokuvamile akuxazululwa ngokwanele ngenxa yokucwaswa kanye nokuntula ukwazi ukuthi ukuzibulala kuyinkinga enkulu yezempilo yomphakathi. Imiphakathi nayo idlala indima ebalulekile ekuvimbeleni ukuzibulala. Ikhithi yamathuluzi yokuxoxisana nomphakathi weWHO iqondisa imiphakathi ekuhlonzeni izinto ezibalulekile futhi isebenzise imisebenzi ngokwezimo zendawo. Impendulo yeWHO: Ukuphuthuma kokuthatha isinyathelo ukuvimbela ukuzibulala kuye kwaqashelwa futhi kwabekwa eqhulwini emazingeni aphezulu.

Ngenkathi ubuhlobo phakathi kwesifebe nezimo zengqondo (ikakhulukazi, ukuthangatha kanye nezinkinga zokusebenzisa utshwala) kanye nesilingiso esedlule sesifebe sisezwakala kahle emazweni anezempilo ephezulu, izifebe eziningi zenzeka ngokuphuthumayo nasezindlini zokulungiswa.  Izinto ezingcono kakhulu zokwenza isifebe zihlanganisa ukuhlangabezana nokulahlekelwa, ukukhulupheka, ukuhlukunyezwa, ukuhlala ngaphandle kwabantu, izinkinga zezemali, ubuhlungu obungapheli kanye nesifo, ubugejo, ukuhlukunyezwa, nokulwa noma eminye imisebenzi yomuntu. Ukugunyazwa ngokweqile ngemibono yezempilo zengqondo kanye nesifebe kusho ukuthi abantu abaningi abacabanga ngesifebe abangazama ukuthola usizo. Izifebe nezilingiso zifaka umthelela omuhle kwi-families, abangani, abasebenzi, imiphakathi nezihlengikazi. Isifebe: amanothi nezibalo emhlabeni wonke. Ingxoxo yomhlaba wonke ngo-2019.
