translations.source: The European Commission and WHO launch landmark digital health initiative to strengthen global health security The World Health Organization (WHO) and European Commission have announced today the launch of a landmark digital health partnership. In June 2023, WHO will take up the European Union (EU) system of digital COVID-19 certification to establish a global system that will help facilitate global mobility and protect citizens across the world from on-going and future health threats, including pandemics. This is the first building block of the WHO Global Digital Health Certification Network (GDHCN) that will develop a wide range of digital products to deliver better health for all. “Building on the EU’s highly successful digital certification network, WHO aims to offer all WHO Member States access to an open-source digital health tool, which is based on the principles of equity, innovation, transparency and data protection and privacy,” said Dr Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus, WHO Director-General. “New digital health products in development aim to help people everywhere receive quality health services quickly and more effectively”. Based on the EU Global Health Strategy and WHO Global strategy on digital health, the initiative follows the 30 November 2022 agreement between Commissioner Kyriakides and Dr Tedros to enhance strategic cooperation on global health issues. This further bolsters a robust multilateral system with WHO at its core, powered by a strong EU.“This partnership is an important step for the digital action plan of the EU Global Health Strategy. By using European best practices we contribute to digital health standards and interoperability globally—to the benefit of those most in need. It is also a powerful example of how alignment between the EU and the WHO can deliver better health for all, in the EU and across the world. As the directing and coordinating authority on international health work, there is no better partner than the WHO to advance the work we started at the EU and further develop global digital health solutions,” said Stella Kyriakides, Commissioner for Health and Food Safety. This partnership will include close collaboration in the development, management and implementation of the WHO GDHCN system, benefitting from the European Commission’s ample technical expertise in the field. A first step is to ensure that the current EU digital certificates continue to function effectively.“ With 80 countries and territories connected to the EU Digital COVID-19 Certificate, the EU has set a global standard. The EU certificate has not only been an important tool in our fight against the pandemic, but has also facilitated international travel and tourism. I am pleased that the WHO will build on the privacy-preserving principles and cutting-edge technology of the EU certificate to create a global tool against future pandemics,” added Thierry Breton, Commissioner for Internal Market. A global WHO system building on EU legacy One of the key elements in the European Union’s work against the COVID-19 pandemic has been digital COVID-19 certificates. To facilitate free movement within its borders, the EU swiftly established interoperable COVID-19 certificates (entitled ‘EU Digital COVID-19 Certificate’ or ‘EU DCC’). Based on open-source technologies and standards it allowed also for the connection of non-EU countries that issue certificates according to EU DCC specifications, becoming the most widely used solution around the world. From the onset of the pandemic, WHO engaged with all WHO Regions to define overall guidelines for such certificates. To help strengthen global health preparedness in the face of growing health threats, WHO is establishing a global digital health certification network which builds upon the solid foundations of the EU DCC framework, principles and open technologies. With this collaboration, WHO will facilitate this process globally under its own structure with the aim to allow the world to benefit from convergence of digital certificates. This includes standard-setting and validation of digital signatures to prevent fraud. In doing so, WHO will not have access to any underlying personal data, which would continue to be the exclusive domain of governments.
translations.reference: Ikhomishini yaseEurope neWHO bethule isikhonkwane sokuqala ezempilo zedijithali ukuqinisa ukuphepha kwezempilo emhlabeni. Inhlangano yeZempilo yoMhlaba (WHO) neKhomishini yase-Europe bathule namhlanje isikhonkwane sokubambisana kwezempilo zedijithali. NgoNhlangulana 2023, iWHO izothatha European Union uhlelo lwedijithali lwesitifiketi seCOVID-19 ukwenza uhlelo lomhlaba oluzosiza ukusiza ukunyakaza kwezomhlaba nokuvikela izakhamisi emhlabeni wonke ekuqhubekeni kokusabisa kwezempilo yekusasa, okubandakanya ubhubhane. Lena ibhulokhi yesakhiwo sokuqala yeWHO Global Didital Health Certification Network (GDHCN) ezodevelopha okwahlukene okuningi kwemikhiqizo yedijithali ezoletha ezempilo ezingcono kuwona wonke umuntu. "Ukwakha ku-EU ukuphumelela okukhulu kohlelokuxhumana lwesitifiketi sedijithali,WHO ihlose ukunikeza iMember State yonke ukungena kuthuluzi lezempilo yedijithali eliwumthombo ovulelelkile olugxile kumigomo yokulingana, ukwenza kabusha, ukwethembeka nokuvikelwa kwedatha nobumfihlo," kusho uDkt Tedros Adhanom Ghebreysus, uMqondisi Jikelele weWHO. "Imikhiqizo yezempilo yedijithali emisha ekuthuthukiseni ehlose ukusiza abantu yonke indawo ukuthi bathole okwezempilo okufanele ngokushesha nangendlela efanele". NgokweEU Global Health Strategy neWHO Global isu lwezempilo yedijithali, umzamo ulandela isivumelwano sangomhlaka-30 kuLwezi 2022 phakathi kweKhomishini Kyriakides noDkt Tedros ukwengesa isu lokusebenza ezinkingeni zempilo zomhlaba. Lokhu kuqhubeka kwezeseko kohlelo olukhulu lokuningi neWHO kanye nomongo, kunikwa amandla yi-EU eqinile. "Lokhu kubambisana kuyigxathu elibalulekile lohlelo lokwenza lwedijithali le-EU Global Health Strategy. Ngokusebenzisa ukwenza okuhle kwaseEurope sifaka isandla kumazinga ezempilo yedijithali kanye nokusebenzisana emhlabeni-ukuze kuzuze bonke abadingayo. Kuphinde kube yiibonelo esinamandla ukuthi kuhambisana kanjani phakathi kwe-EU neWHO ukuletha ezempilo engcono kuwona wonke umuntu, ku-EU nasemhlabeni wonke. Njengokuqondisa negunya lokuxhumanisa emsebenzini wezempilo wamazwe angaphandle, akekho umbambisani ongcono ukunoWHO ukuqhubekisa umsebenzi esesiwuqalile eEU nokuqhubela ukudevelopha izixazululo zempilo yedijithali yomhlaba," kusho uStella Kyriakides, Ikhomishani yeZempilo noKuphepha koKudla. Lokhu kubambisana kuzofaka ukubambisana kwezentuthuko, ukuphatha nokwenza kohlelo lweWHO GDHCN ukuzuza kuKhomishini ye-Europe kongoti bezobuchwepheshe kulomkhakha. Igxathu lokuqala ukuqinisekisa ukuthi izitifiketi zedijithali zamanje ze-EU ziyaqhubeka zisebenza kahle. Namazwe angu 80 kanye nezindawo ezixhumene nesitifiketi se-EU Digital COVID-19, i-EU isiyenze izinga lomhlaba. Isitifiketi se-EU asibanga yithuluzi elibalulekile kuphela ekulweni kwethu nobhubhane kodwa kodwa siphinde sasiza ezokuvakasha nokuhamba kwamazwe angaphandle. Ngiyajabula ukuthi Iwho izokwakha kumigomo yokugcina ubumfihlo nezobuchwepheshe eziphambili kwesitifiketi se-EU ukwenza ithuluzi lomhlaba lobhubhane lwekusasa, kwengeza uThierry Breton, Ikhomishini yeMakethe yaMazwe angaphandle. Uhlelo lomhlaba lweWHO lwakha efeni le-EU Enye yezinto ezibalulekile emsebenzini weEuropean Union okubhekene nobhubhane lweCOVID-19 sekube yizitifiketi zeCOVID-19. Ukusiza ukuhamba ngokukhululeka kumingcele yayo, i-EU yashesha yenza ukusebenzisana ngezitifiketi zeCOVID-19 (ezisihloko 'EU Digital COVID-19 Certificate' noma i-'EU DCC'). Ngokwezobuchwepheshe obuvulelekile bezobuchwepheshe namazinga kuphinde kuvumele konke ukuxhumana bamazwe angekho kuEU akhipha izitifiketi ngokwe-EU DCC iziqondiso, okuba okuvulelekile kakhulu kwesixazululo esisetshenzisiwe emhlabeni wonke. Kusukela ekuqaleni kobhubhane, iWHO yakhuluma nazo zonke izifunda zeWHO ukuchaza imibandela yonke yezitifiketi. Ukusiza ukuqinisa ukuzilungiselela ezempilo komhlaba ukubhekana nokukhula kokusabisa kwezempilo, iWHO yakha uhlelokuxhumana lwesitifiketi sezempilo yedijithali yomhlaba eyakhiwa phezu kwesisekelo esiqinile yomhlahlandlela we-EU DCC, imigomo kanye nezobuchwepheshe obuvulelekile. Lokhu kubambisana iWHO izosiza loluhlelo emhlabeni ngaphansi kwesakhiwo sayo ngenhloso yokuvumela ukuthi umhlaba uhlomule ekujikeni kwezitifiketi zedijithali. Lokhu kubandakanya ukuhlela izinga nokuqinisekiswa kwemisayino yedijithali ukuze kugwenywe ukukhwabanisa. Ngokwenza njalo, iWHO ngeke ikwazi ukungena kweminye imininingo yomuntu, okuzoqhubeka kube umkhakha owehlukile wahulumeni.
translations.hypothesis:
Here's a translation of the provided document into Zulu.gs, aiming for accuracy and clarity while respecting the nuances of the language.  I've included explanations of some choices after the translation to clarify certain phrasing.

**Zulu.gs Translation:**

I-European Commission kanye ne-WHO bazula umzamo omkhulu wezempilo yedijithali ukuqinisa ukuphepha kwezempilo emhlabeni jikelele. I-World Health Organization (WHO) kanye ne-European Commission zethule ngokwemvelo umbono wokubambisana wezempilo yedijithali namhlanje.  NgoJuni 2023, i-WHO izothatha uhlelo lwe-European Union (EU) lokwazisa nge-COVID-19 yedijithali ukusungula uhlelo lomhlaba wonke oluzosiza ekuguquleni kahle emhlabeni futhi kugcine abantu emhlabeni jikelele ezimweni zezempilo ezijikelezayo nezesoza, kubandakanya nezifo zokwelashwa ngokwengeleza.  Lona ngumhlathi wokuqala we-WHO Global Digital Health Certification Network (GDHCN) ozokwakha imikhiqizo yedijithali ehlukahlukene ukuletha izempilo ezihlelwile kubo bonke. “Sisekelwe kwinethiwekhi yeziqu ezedijithali ehlale iyimpumelelo kakhulu ye-EU, i-WHO ihlose ukunika wonke amazwe angamemebala e-WHO ukufinyelela ithuluzi lezempilo yedijithali elivulekile, elisekelwe ezimisweni zobulungisa, ubuciko, ukucacisa nokuvikela imidali kanye neminye imininingwane,” kusho uDkt Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus, umphathi we-WHO. “Imikhiqizo emisha yedijithali esekulungile ukukhiqizwa ihlose ukusiza abantu bemuzi wonke ukuthola izempilo ezisezingeni eliphezulu ngokushesha futhi ngendlela efanelekayo.”  Ngokusekelwe kwi-EU Global Health Strategy kanye ne-WHO Global strategy yezempilo yedijithali, lo mzamo uyalandela umvuzo we-30 November 2022 phakathi kukaMhlalisi Kyriakides noDkt Tedros ukuthuthukisa ukubambisana okuhle kakhulu ngezinkinga zezempilo emhlabeni jikelele.  Lokhu kukhuthaza kakhulu isikhungo esiqinile sezemvelo esinohlelo olukhulu, elihamba phambili nge-WHO. “Lona ubumbano yisinyathelo esibalulekile ngohlelo lokwenza umsebenzi we-EU Global Health Strategy.  Sisebenzisa izinto ezihamba phambili zase-European ukufaka umnikelo ekwakhiweni kwezezempilo ezisezingeni eliphezulu nokusebenzelana emhlabeni jikelele—ngokusebenzisa labo abadinga usizo kakhulu.  Kuyisibonelo esinamandla sokuthi ukuhlanganyela phakathi kwe-EU ne-WHO kungakwazi ukuletha izempilo ezihlelwile kubo bonke, e-EU futhi emhlabeni jikelele.  Njengohlelo olukhulu lokukhulisa nokuhlanganyela emisebenzini yezempilo emhlabeni jikelele, akukho umphathina ongcono ngaphezu kwe-WHO ukuthuthukisa umsebenzi osiqale e-EU futhi sithuthukise izixazululo zedijithali emhlabeni jikelele,” kusho uStella Kyriakides, umhlalisi wezempilo nokuphepha kwokudla.  Lona ubumbano uzokwazi ukubambisana okusondele ekwakhiweni, ekulawulweni nasekufakelweni kwesikhungo se-WHO GDHCN, ngokuphila ngokuqinisile ngobuchwepheshe obukhulu be-European Commission ngale ndawo.  Isinyathelo sokuqala ukugcwalisa ukuthi ama-certificate e-EU yedijithali a qhubeke nokusebenza kahle. “Ngabazali bemazwe nezifunda ezi-80 abaxhumekile kwi-EU Digital COVID-19 Certificate, i-EU isethule isisekelo somhlaba jikelele.  I-certificate ye-EU akuyilona ithuluzi elibalulekile ekulweni kwethu ne-pandemic, kodwa futhi lwesekile ukuhamba kahle nokuhamba komhlaba.  Ngiyajabula ukuthi i-WHO izakwenza umsebenzi kwi-principles yokuvikela imidali kanye nobuchwepheshe obukhulu be-certificate ye-EU ukukhiqiza ithuluzi lomhlaba jikelele ngokumelene nezifo zokwelashwa ngokwengeleza ezizayo,” wanezela uThierry Breton, umhlalisi weMarket yangaphakathi.  Uhlelo lomhlaba wonke we-WHO olusekelwe emuva ye-EU  Enye yezinto ezibaluleke kakhulu emsebenzini we-European Union ngokumelene ne-COVID-19 i-certificates ye-COVID-19 yedijithali.  Ukuvumela ukuhamba kahle ngaphakathi kwemihlaba yayo, i-EU isungule ngokushesha ama-certificates okuvumela ukuhambisa (aholwa nge-'EU Digital COVID-19 Certificate' noma 'EU DCC').  Ngokusekelwe kubuchwepheshe obivulekile kanye nezindinganiso, kuvumela futhi ukuxhumeka kwe amazwe angaphandle kwe-EU ayethola ama-certificates ngokwesingqi se-EU DCC, okuyoba isixazululo esisetshenziswa kakhulu emhlabeni jikelele.  Kusukela ekuqaleni kwesifo esithathelwayo, i-WHO ihlanganyezele nazo zonke i-WHO Regions ukuchaza imiyalelo ebanjayo yalezi ziqu.  Ukusiza ukuthuthukisa ukulungiselela izempilo emhlabeni jikelele ngokuqapha izimponyomoya zezempilo ezikhulayo, i-WHO ikwakha inethiwekhi yedijithali yezempilo yokwazisa emhlabeni jikelele ebanjisa emuva kwesisekelo esiqinile se-EU DCC framework, principles kanye nobuchwepheshe obivulekile.  Ngale ndaba, i-WHO izosiza lo msebenzi emhlabeni jikelele ngaphansi kwesakhiwo sayo ngombono wokuvumela izwe lonke ukuthi lizivikele ekuhlanganyeni kweziqu ezidijithali.  Lokhu kubandakanya ukusethula izindinganiso nokuvumelana kwezimpahla zedijithali ukuvimba ukukwazi ukwenza umsebenzi.  Ngale ndaba, i-WHO ngeke ibe nokuqapha imininingwane yomuntu yonke, ezosala njengomkhakha wezindaba wezizwe.

translations.source: The first building block of the global WHO system becomes operational in June 2023 and aims to be progressively developed in the coming months. A long-term digital partnership to deliver better health for all To facilitate the uptake of the EU DCC by WHO and contribute to its operation and further development, WHO and the European Commission have agreed to partner in digital health. This partnership will work to technically develop the WHO system with a staged approach to cover additional use cases, which may include, for example, the digitisation of the International Certificate of Vaccination or Prophylaxis. Expanding such digital solutions will be essential to deliver better health for citizens across the globe. This cooperation is based on the shared values and principles of transparency and openness, inclusiveness, accountability, data protection and privacy, security, scalability at a global level, and equity. The WHO and the European Commission will work together to encourage maximum global uptake and participation. Particular attention will be paid to equitable opportunities for the participation by those most in need: low and middle-income countries.
translations.reference: Ibhulokhu yesakhiwo sokuqala yohlelo lomhlaba lweWHO luqala ukusebenza ngoNhlangulana 2023 futhi ihlose ukuqhubeka nokudevelopha ezinyangeni ezizayo. Ukubambisana kwedijithali kwesikhathi eside ukuletha ezempilo ezingcono kuwona wonke umuntu. Ukusiza ukuthatha kwe-EU DCC yiWHO nokufaka isandla ekusebenzeni kwayo nokuqhubeka nokuthuthuka, iWHO neKhomishini yaseEurope sebevumelene ukubambisana kwezempilo yedijithali. Lokhu kubambisana kuzosebenza ukudevelopha ngezobuchwepheshe yohlelo lweWHO nokukhombisa indlela ukukhava ukusebenzisa amacala engeziwe, okungafaka, isibonelo, idijithalizeshini ye-International Certificate of Vaccination noma iProphylaxis. Ukwandisaizixazululo zedijithali ezinjalo ekwabelaneni ngokubalulekile nemigomo kuzobaluleka ukuletha ezempilo ezingcono kuzakhamizi kuwona wonke umhlaba. Loku kusebenza kuncike ekwabelaneni ngokubalulekile kanue nemigomo yokwethembeka nokuvuleleka, ukufaka abanye ukwenza isibopho ukuvikelwa kwemininingo nobumfihlo, ukuphepha, ukukaleka ezingeni lomhlaba nokulingana. I-WHO neKhomishi yseEurope bazosebenza ndawonye ukukhuthaza ukuthathwa komhlaba okukhulu nokubamba iqhaza. Ukunaka okuthile kuzokhokhelwa kumathuba alinganayo ekubambeni iqhaza kulabo abanesidingo amazwe anemali engenayo encane nephakathi nendawo.

translations.source: Seventy-sixth World Health Assembly – Daily update: 30 May 2023 WHO’s annual assembly ends with agreement on funding, and array of health topics WHO’s 76th health assembly closed today, having addressed a vast array of issues, including behavioural sciences; best buys for non-communicable diseases; diagnostics; disabilities; drowning prevention; emergency, critical and operative care; food micronutrients; indigenous health; infection prevention and control; maternal and child health; medical oxygen; primary health care; refugee and migrant health; rehabilitation; traditional medicine, and WHO’s work in responding to dozens of emergencies while working with Member States to be better prepared to face new ones. Earlier in the day, delegates in Committee A agreed to note the roadmap towards the Global Health and Peace Initiative (along with a slight change in name from “Global Health for Peace Initiative”), and requested that the Director-General report on progress in strengthening the roadmap. In plenary, as the final approval step of the assembly, delegates adopted the resolutions and decisions of the two committees, and adopted their reports. This included approval of the budget for 2024-25, and a 20% increase in assessed contributions. The committee chairs and representatives from two regions spoke to recognize the work and progress of this Assembly. In his closing remarks, Dr Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus, WHO’s Director-General, noted that “the increase in assessed contributions and the investment round are historic and a huge milestone.” He spoke about the year ahead, with high-level meetings on universal health coverage, tuberculosis and pandemic preparedness and response at this year’s UN General Assembly. He pointed to the continuing negotiations on the pandemic accord and amendments to the International Health Regulations as unprecedented—“generational”—opportunities to learn from the mistakes of the COVID-19 pandemic and ensure they are not repeated. Delegates also had the chance to hear from former WHO staff Gwen Carnelley, who turned 100 this year, who began working with WHO in 1949, just a year after WHO was founded 75 years ago. Video of Closing of the 76th World Health Assembly. Gwen Carnelley is introduced at 54:37 and speaks shortly afterwards. Starting tomorrow, the 153rd meeting of Executive Board begins, where the outcomes of the Assembly will be discussed, among other things.
translations.reference: Umhlangano weZempilo woMhlaba wesi-76 - Ukubuyekezwa kosuku: ziwu-30 kuNhlaba 2023 Umhlangano wonyaka weWHO uphela ngesivumelwano soxhasomali kanye nezinhlelo zezihloko zezempilo Umhlangano wezempilo wesi-76 weWHO uyavalwa namhlanje, nokubhekana nezinhlelo eziningi zezinkinga kanye nokuziphatha kwezesayensi; ukuthenga okuhle kwezifo okungaxhunyanwa ngazo, ukuxilonga, ukukhubazeka, ukuvikela ukuminza, okuphuthumayo nobucayi bokusebenza kokunakekelwa; izakhamzimba ezincane zokudla; ezempilo zomdabu; ukuvikelwa kokuthelelana nokulawula; ukuzala nezempilo yomntwana; umoyampilo wezokwelapha; ukunakekelwa kwezempilo kokuqala; abangenandawo nempilo yabafuduki; ukuvuselelwa kwesimilo; ukwelapha ngokwesintu nosebenzi weWHO wokuphendula amadazini okuphuthumayo ngesikhathi besebenza neMember States ukuze bazilungiselele kangcono ukubhekana nezintsha. Ekuqaleni kosuku izihambeli eKomidini A zivumelene ukuqaphela umgwaqobalazwe oya kuGlobal and Peace Initiative (okuhambisana nokushintsha okuncane egameni le-"Global Health for Peace Initiative"), futhi bacela ukuthi uMqondisi Jikelele umbiko wokuqhubeka ekuqiniseni umgwaqobalazwe. Ohlelweni njengegxathu lokugcina lokugunyaza kokuhlangana, izihambeli zathatha izixazululo kanye nezinqumo kwamakomidi amabili futhi bathatha nemibiko yabo. Lokhu kufake ukugunyazwa kohlelomali luka-2024-2025 nokunyuka ngamaphesenti angu-20 okuhlolwa kokufakiwe. Izihlalo zekomidi kanye nababamele abasuka ezifundeni ezimbili bakhulumile ukubona umsebenzi nokuqhubeka kwale-Essembly. Ngamazwi akhe okuvala, uDkt Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus, uMqondisi jikelele weWHO uqaphele ukuthi "ukwenyuka kokubhekwa kokufakiwe kanye notshalomali kwezomlando kanye nohambo olude olukhulu." Ukhulume ngonyaka olandelayo,ngemihlangano esezingeni eliphezulu ekukhavweni kwezempilo yomhlaba, isifo sofuba nokulungiselela ubhubhane kanye nokuphendula kulonyaka ku-UN General Assembly. Ukhombe ekuqhubekeni kwezingxoxo ngokobhubhane kanye nezichibiyelo ku-International Health Regulations njengokungalindelekile-okwesizukulwane-amathuba okufunda emaphutheni obhubhane lweCOVID-19 nokuqinisekisa ukuthi awaphindi. Izithunywa ziphinde zathola ithuba lokuzwa kubasebenzi bangaphambili beWHO uGwen Carnelley, owahlanganisa iminyaka eyi-100 kulo nyaka, owaqala ukusebenza neWHO ngo-1949, ngemva nje konyaka kwasungulwa iWHO eminyakeni engu-75 edlule. Ividiyo yokuvala kwe-76 World Health Assembly. U-Gwen Carnelley wethulwe ngo-54:37 futhi wabe esekhuluma emva kwalapho. Kuqala kusasa,umhlangano wesi-153 Webhodi labaPhathi uyaqala, lapho imiphumela ye-Assembly izodingidwa kwezinye zezinto.

Ikhonsultiso Yesi-76 Sezempilo Zomhlaba - Isibuyekezo Sansuku: 30 May 2023.  Umhlangano waminyaka yonke we-WHO uyaphela ngokuvumelana ngokwezimali, kanye nohlu olumanyisile lwezihloko zezempilo. Umhlangano we-76 wezempilo we-WHO uvale namhlanje, emva kokubheka izinkinga eziningi, okuhlanganisa izivivinyo zezindlela zokuziphata; izinto ezibaluleke kakhulu zokwelapha izifo ezingakhipheteki; ukuxilongwa; ukulimaza; ukwazi ukuvikela ukungcola; ukunakekelwa kwezimo eziphuthayo, ezibaluleke kakhulu, nezisebenzayo; imiklopho yezinsalu ezincibilikisiwe; ezempilo zabantu bakubo; ukwazi ukulawula ukwelashwa kwesifo esithathelwayo; ezempilo zabanye abavikeli kanye nabathuthukisi; ukubuyisela ubuhle; iziyalo zendabuko zezempilo, kanye nomsebenzi we-WHO ekuphenduleni izimo zezingosi ezimbalwa, kuyilapho kusebenzisana nezizwe ezilungile ukuthi zilungiselele kangcono ukulwa nezimo ezintsha.  Ngosuku olukhulu, abahleli kwiKomiti A bavumelana ngokuthi babheke umhlahlandlela ohambayo ohambisana nohlelo lweGlobal Health and Peace Initiative (noma ukushintsha okuncane ngesihloko esithi “Global Health for Peace Initiative”), futhi bacele uMqondisi Jikelele ukuthi anikeze ingxenye yokuthuthukisa umhlahlandlela.  Kwi-plenary, njengesinyathelo sokugunyaza sokugcina somhlangano, abahleli bamukela izinqumo nezinqumo zezinkomiti ezimbili, futhi bavumela izibongo zakho.  Lokhu kubandakanya ukugunyaza umthethosisekelo wemali we-2024-25, kanye nokunyusa ngamaphesenti ayi-20 ekubikezeleni.  Izinhloko zezinkomiti kanye nabadlulela izifunda ezimbili baxoxa ukubona umsebenzi nokuthuthuka kwale Ndlu.  Ekupheleni kwakhe, uDkt Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus, uMqondisi Jikelele we-WHO, uqaphele ukuthi “ukunyusa ekubikezeleni kanye nokufakela izimali kubucikele futhi kubanga elikhulu.”  Ukhulume ngokuthi kuzoba kanjani unyaka ozayo, ngemihlangano ebaluleke kakhulu mayelana nokufakelwa kwempilo yonke, i-tuberculosis kanye nokulungiselela ukuthi kuncike kanjani nokuphendula izifo eziphilileyo kulo nyaka we-UN General Assembly.  Uqaphele ukuthi kuzayo izimelane ezihambisana ngokuthi ziqhathanise ngokuphuthayo ngohlelo lokwelashwa kwezifo eziphilileyo kanye nezinguquko ku-International Health Regulations njengothando olungaphezulu—“ngesizukulwane”—lwezindlela zokufunda ngemikhuba engalungile ye-COVID-19 futhi kuqiniseke ukuthi akuzange kutholakale. Ividiyo yokugcina kwesizindlu sesi-76 se-World Health Assembly. U-Gwen Carnelley uyethulwa eku-54:37 futhi uyakhuluma ngokushesha ngemuva kwakho. Kusasa, umhlangano we-153 we-Executive Board uqala, lapho iziphumo zomhlangano zizoxoxwa, phakathi kwezinye izinto.

translations.source: Seventy-sixth World Health Assembly – Daily update: 29 May 2023 Landmark resolution for strengthening Indigenous Peoples’ health globally The World Health Assembly today approved an unprecedented resolution on the health of Indigenous Peoples, which requests the Director-General to develop a global action plan for the health of indigenous peoples and to present it to the Seventy-ninth World Health Assembly in 2026. Indigenous Peoples, although representing diverse population groups and communities, in general have considerably lower life expectancy than non-indigenous populations. They also have a higher prevalence of many diseases and adverse health conditions, including diabetes, maternal and infant mortality and malnutrition. The Assembly requested the action plan be developed in consultation with Indigenous Peoples; that WHO provide support to Member States, upon request, for improving indigenous health; and that the improvement of Indigenous Peoples’ health be included in the development of the Fourteenth WHO General Programme of Work. In the same resolution, the Health Assembly urged Member States to, among other tasks, develop knowledge about the health situation of Indigenous Peoples, with their free, prior and informed consent; develop, fund and implement national health plans, strategies or other measures for Indigenous Peoples; encourage the attraction, training, recruitment and retention of Indigenous Peoples as health workers taking into account the traditional knowledge and practices. Related document: A76/A/CONF./1 - Health of Indigenous Peoples First-ever resolution to accelerate action on drowning preventionThe delegates at the Seventy-sixth World Health Assembly agreed a resolution to accelerate action on global drowning prevention. The resolution requests Member States to assess their national drowning situation and to develop and implement multisectoral drowning prevention programmes. Drowning causes 236 000 deaths every year. It is a leading global cause of injury-related child deaths. Over the past decade, 2.5 million people died from drowning, and over 90% of those occurred in low- and middle-income countries. At the invitation of the United Nations (UN) General Assembly, WHO will coordinate actions within the UN system on drowning prevention and facilitate the observance of World Drowning Prevention Day on 25 July each year. WHO will also set up a Global Alliance for Drowning Prevention with organizations of the UN system, international development partners and nongovernmental organizations. To better understand the true burden and impact of drowning, the resolution further requests WHO to prepare a global status report on drowning prevention. Related document: EB152/CONF./2 - Accelerating action on global drowning prevention Read more about the resolution World Drowning Prevention Day 2023 Member States mobilize behind resolution to tackle chemicals, waste and pollution Member States welcomed the resolution addressing environmental determinants, including management of chemicals and waste. The efforts can help prevent up to one fifth of all suicide-related deaths from highly hazardous pesticides.
translations.reference: I-World Health Assembly yamashumi ayisithupha nesithupha - Ukubuyekezwa nsuku zonke: ngo-29 kuNhlaba 2023. Isixazululo siyisikhonkwane sokuqinisa ezempilo yabantu bomdabu emhlabeni. Umhlangano weZempilo woMhlaba namhlanje ugunyaze isiqumo esingakaze sibe khona kwezempilo yebantu bomdabu, esifuna ukuthi uMqondisi Jikelele adevelophe uhlelo lokwenza lomhlaba lwezempilo yabantu bomdabu bese eyalwethula kuMhlangano weZempilo womhlaba wamashumi ayisikhombisa nesishagalolunye ngo-2026. Abantu bomdabu, yize noma bemele isibalo sabantu abehlukene kanye nemiphakathi, ngokujwayelekile kucatshangelwa abanempilo ephansi ukunokungebona abantu bomdabu. Baphinde babe nokujwayelekile okukhulu kwezifo eziningi kanye nezimo zempilo ezahlukene, okubandakanya ushukela,ukuzala kanye nokushona kwezingane kanye nokungondleki. Umhlangano ucele uhlelo lokwenza ludevelophwe ngokuxhumana nabantu bomdabu; leyo WHO inikeza ukweseka kuMembers States, ngokucelwa ukwenza ngcono ezempilo zendabuko; futhi ukwenza ngcono ezempilo yaBantu boMdabu kungafakwa ekuthuthukisweni kohlelo jikelele lweWHO lomsebenzi weshuminane. Ngesixazululo esifanayo, iHealth Assembly inxuse iMember States kweminye imisebenzi ukudevelopha ulwazi ngesimo sezempilo yabantu bomdabu, ngokukhululeka kwabo, kanye nokunikeza imvume; ukudevelopha, ukuxhasa nokwenza izinhlelo zempilo zezwe,amasu kanye nezinye izinyathelo zabantu bomdabu; ukugqugquzela ukuheha, ukuqeqesha, ukuqasha nokuphinda kubantu bomdabu njengabasebenzi bezempilo uphinde ucabange ulwazi lwesintu kanye nokwenza. Idokhumenti ehlobene: A76/A/CONF./1 - Ezempilo zaBantu bomdabu. Isixaululo sokuqala ukuqhuba ukwenza ekuvikelweni kokuminza, izihambeli eMhlanganweni weZempilo woMhlaba wamashumi ayisithupha nesithupha basivuma isixazululo sokuqhuba ukwenza ekuvikeleni ukuminza emhlabeni. Isicelo sesixazululo seMember States ukubheka isimo sabo sokuminza kanye nokudevelopha nokwenza ngemikhakha eminingi izinhlelo zokuvikela ukuminza. Okudala ukuminza ukufa okungu-236 000 njalo ngonyaka. Isizathu somhlaba esihamba phambili kokufa kwezingane okuhlobene nokulimala. Kushuminyaka eledlule, abantu abayizigidi ezingu-2.5 bafa ngenxa yokuminza futhi ngaphezu kuka-90% walokho kwenzeka emazweni anemali engenayo encane kuya kwephakathi nendawo. Esimemweni se-United Nations (UN) General Assembly, iWHO izoxhumanisa izenzo kuhlelo lweUN lokuvikela ukuminza nokusiza ukunaka uSuku lokuVikela ukuMinza eMhlabeni ngomhlaka-25 kuNtulikazi njalo ngonyaka. I-WHO izophinde ihlele iGlobal Alliance yokuvikela ukuminza nezinhlangano zohlelo lwe-UN, ababambisani bokuthuthukisa amazwe angaphandle kanye nezinhlangano ezizimele. Ukuqonda kangcono umthwalo wangempela nomthelela wokuminza, isixazululo zezicelo kuWHO ukulungiselela umbiko wesimo samhlaba ekuvikeleni ukuminza. Amadokhumentu ahlobene: EB152/CONF./2 - Ukuqhuba ukwenza ngokuvikela ukuminza emhlabeni Funda okwengeziwe ngesixazululo Usuku lokuvikela ukuminza emhlabeni 2023 I-Member States ihlanganise isinqumo ngemuva kokubhekana namakhemikhali, udoti kanye nokungcola, ama-Member State amukele isinqumo sokubhekana nabazinikele bendawo, okufana nokuphathwa kwamakhemikhali kanye nodoti. Imizamo ingasiza ukuvikela kuze kufike ngokufa okuhlobene nokuzibulala okuvela kuzibulalanambuzane.

Here's a translation of the provided document into Zulu.gs, aiming for clarity and accuracy while considering the nuances of the language.  I've included explanations after the translation to clarify some choices and potential areas for further refinement.

**Zulu.gs Translation:**

Ikhonsultini Yomhlaba Wonke Wezempilo (World Health Assembly) – Isibuyekezo Sanamuhla: 29 May 2023. Isinqumo esibaluleke kakhulu sokuqinisisa impilo yabantu basemidlalo (Indigenous Peoples) emhlabeni jikelele. Ikhonsultini Yomhlaba Wonke Wezempilo namuhla yamukela isinqumo esingajwayelezwa ngokweqile ngempilo yabantu basemidlalo, esicela uMqondisi Jikelele ukuhlela uhlelo lokusebenza lomhlaba wonke wezempilo yabantu basemidlalo futhi likhiphe kwi-Ikhonsultini Yomhlaba Wonke Wezempilo yesi-79 ngobhunga ka-2026. Abantu basemidlalo, noma ngabe bambela izinhlehlahlala zezinhloko zombantu nezimphakathi, ngokuvamile banempilo ephantsi kakhulu kunabantu abangabazi. Banenani eliphezulu lezifo nezimo eziphazulekayo zezempilo, okuhlanganisa ukhova, ukufa kwabakhubazekile nemfana, nokuntsha. Ikhonsultini icela ukuthi le nhlelo yokusebenza ihlelwe ngokubambisana nabantu basemidlalo; ukuthi i-WHO inikeze usizo kubezindima zezifundazwe, uma kucelwa, ukuvimbela impilo yabantu basemidlalo; nokuthi ukuthuthukisa impilo yabantu basemidlalo kufakwe ekwenzeni uhlelo lokusebenza olujwayelekile lwe-WHO.  Ngaleso sinqumo, i-Health Assembly yacelela izifundazwe, phakathi kwezinye izinto, ukuthi zitholele ulwazi ngesimo sempilo yabantu basemidlalo, ngemvumo wabo, ngaphambili futhi ngokuqinile; ukuthi zakhe, zixhase futhi zisebenzise izinhlelo, izigaba noma izinyathelo zezempilo zabantu basemidlalo; ukuthi zekeze ukukhuza, ukuthuthukisa, ukukhetha nokugcina abantu basemidlalo njengabantu basezempilo, ngokuqonda ulwazi nemvelo yezindaba zendabuko.

Imbhungano edume: A76/A/CONF./1 - Impilo yabantu basemidlalo. Isinqumo sokuqala sokusheshisa ukusebenza ekwelapheleni kwokugqoka. Abahlanganyeli be-Ikhonsultini Yomhlaba Wonke Wezempilo bavumelana nesinqumo sokusheshisa ukusebenza ekwelapheleni kwokugqoka emhlabeni. Isinqumo sicela izifundazwe ukuthi zihlalele isimo sokugqoka sezifundazwe zazo futhi zakhe futhi zisebenzise izinhlelo zokwelaphela ukugqoka ezisebenzisana nezinhlehlahlala eziningi. Ukugqoka kubangela 236 000 ithuba ngalunye nganyanga. Kuyisizathu esikhulu sokufa kwabantu abancane abagulayo. Kule teni yezinyanga ezedlule, abantu abangu-2.5 million sebelele ngokugqoka, futhi ngaphezu kwe-90% yalezo zibalwa kwasezweni ezincane nezisezingeni ephezulu. Ngemvumo weSiphathikazi Sozama-ntu (UN) General Assembly, i-WHO izohlela ukusebenza ngaphakathi kohlelo lwe-UN ekwelapheleni kwokugqoka futhi yenze kube ngumsebenzi ukugubha Usuku Lokuqala Lokuwelaphela Ukugqoka mhla ka-25 July ngalunye. I-WHO nayo izwakhe i-Global Alliance for Drowning Prevention nezinhlangano zohlelo lwe-UN, abalingani bokuthuthukisa izwe kanye nezinhlangano ezingezona zezindima zezifundazwe. Ukuze kutholwe ukugcotshiwe kwesimo sangempela sokugqoka nokusetshenziswa kwalo, isinqumo sicela futhi i-WHO ukuthi ilungelese umbiko wesimo sendalo emhlabeni ngokuwelaphela ukugqoka.

Imbhungano edume: EB152/CONF./2 - Ukuqinisisa ukusebenza ekwelapheleni kwokugqoka emhlabeni. Funda kabanzi ngaleso sinqumo Usuku Lokuwelaphela Ukugqoka 2023. Izifundazwe zihlanganyela ngemuva kwesinqumo sokulungisa izakhamizi, isiphuzu nokungcola. Izifundazwe zamukelela isinqumo esihlanganisa izinto eziphazulekayo emvelweni, okuhlanganisa ukulungisa izakhamizi nokungcola. Lezomusa zingasiza ekugwetshweni kokuphathwa kwezifundo ezinkulu zokufa ngokugqoka.

*   **Sentence Structure:** Zulu sentence structure can differ significantly from English. I've tried to restructure sentences to sound natural in Zulu while preserving the original meaning.
*   **"Free, prior and informed consent":** This is a complex legal and cultural concept. The translation "ngemvumo wabo, ngaphambili futhi ngokuqinile" attempts to capture the essence, but a more detailed explanation or alternative phrasing might be necessary.
*   **"Global Alliance":** "Global Alliance" is translated as "Global Alliance" as it is a commonly used term.

**Important Considerations:**

*   **Review by Native Zulu Speakers:** This translation *must* be reviewed and refined by native Zulu speakers, preferably those with experience in medical or legal translation.

translations.source: Member States were urged to bolster the implementation of existing WHO strategies including implementation of the WHO Chemicals Roadmap which outlines key roles of the health sector in implementing the Strategic Approach to International Chemicals Management. The resolution also encourages the Ministries of Health to engage in efforts to prepare proposals for an intergovernmental science policy panel and negotiations for a treaty to end plastic pollution. The resolution called upon the Director-General to undertake several actions, including: publishing a report on the health implications of chemicals, waste and pollution from a "One Health" perspective; updating the 2012 document on the State of the Science of Endocrine Disrupting Chemicals jointly with the United Nations Environment Programme; and supporting countries in developing national or regional human biomonitoring programmes for chemicals of concern. Related document: A76/A/CONF./2 - The impact of chemicals, waste and pollution on human health WHO’s work on chemical safety and health Achieving well-being: a global frameworkMember States agreed to adopt the "Global framework for integrating well-being into public health utilizing a health promotion approach", which strives to enable all people to flourish and achieve their full physical and mental health potential throughout their lives and across generations. The Global framework recommends six key strategic directions that focus on: universal health coverage, equitable economies, protecting the planet, social protection systems, digital systems to enable health, and measuring and monitoring well-being. The framework proposes close collaboration with sectors outside the health sector to promote and protect health. It serves as a guide for all stakeholders to engage in a coherent and coordinated manner around a common purpose: promoting the health of people and planet in a sustainable and equitable manner. promoting the health of people and planet in a sustainable and equitable manner. The Assembly requests the Director-General to report on implementation of the global framework in 2024, 2026 and 2031. Related document: A76/7 Add.2 - Well-being and health promotion New resolution to accelerate efforts on food micronutrient fortification The delegates approved a resolution on accelerating efforts to prevent micronutrient deficiencies through safe and effective food fortification. Deficiencies in vitamin and mineral status, particularly of folate, iron, vitamin A, and zinc, affect 50% of all preschool aged children and 67% of all women of reproductive age worldwide. Micronutrient deficiencies can have serious consequences, including spina bifida and other neural tube defects.Large scale food fortification is part of the solution. By adding essential vitamins and minerals to staple foods and condiments, such as wheat and maize flours, rice, cooking oil and salt in accordance with national consumption patterns and deficiencies, countries can correct and further prevent a demonstrated micronutrient deficiency. The resolution urges Member States to develop policies on food fortification with micronutrients and/or supplementation, and to consider ways of strengthening financing and monitoring mechanisms. The resolution was agreed under the umbrella of the United Nations Decade of Action on Nutrition (2016-2025) report. Related document: EB152/CONF./5 Accelerating efforts for preventing micronutrient deficiencies and their consequences, including spina bifida and other neural tube defects, through safe and effective food fortification Related links
translations.reference: Ama-Member State ayanxenxwa ukuba ibe yisezeseko sokwenza samasu akhona eWHO okufaka ukwenza kweMgwaqobalazwe lwamakhemikhali eWHO eveza izindima ezibalulekile emkhakheni wezempilo ekwenzeni Indlela yeSu eKuphathweni kwamaKhemikhali eMazweni angaphandle. Isixazululo siphinde sigqugquzele uNgqongqoshe wezeMpilo ukuthi akhulume emizamweni ukulungiselela iziphakamiso kuphaneli yesayensi yenqubomgomo yangaphakathi kohulumeni kanye nezingxoxo kwesivumelwano sokuqeda ukugcola koshekhasi. Isixazululo sibizwe ngoMqondisi Jikelele ukuthatha izinqumo ezimbalwa, okufaka: Ukushicilela umbiko ezinkingeni zempilo yamakhemikhali, udoti nokungcola ngendlela ye-"One Health"; ukubuyekezwa kwedokhumenti yango-2012 kuState yeScience Of Endocrine Disrupting Chemicals ngokuhlanganyela ne-United NationsEnvironment Programme; futhi ukweseka amazwe ezweni elithuthukayo noma izinhlelo zokubheka abantu besifunda ngokukhathazeka ngamakhemikhali. idokhumenti ehlobene: A76/A/CONF./2 - Umthelela wamakhemikhali,udoti nokungcola kwezempilo yomuntu. Umsebenzi weWHO ekuphepheni kwekhemikhali nokuthola ezempilo nokuphila: umhlahlandlela womhlaba weMember States uvumile ukuthatha umhlahlandlela womhlaba ekuhlanganiseni ukuphila ekusebenziseni kwezempilo zomphakathi indlela yokuqguqguzela ezempilo, okuhlose ukwenza bantu bonke baphumelele futhi bathole okwesiqu sabo konke namandla ezempilo yengqondo ngezimpilo zabo kusona sonke isizukulwane. Umhlahlandlela womhlaba uphakamise izindlela zamasu abalulekile ayisithupha okuzogxilwa kuwona: ukukhavwa kwezempilo emhlabeni,ezomnotho ezilinganayo ukuvikela umhlaba,izinhlelo zokuvikela ezenhlalakahle, izinhlelo zedijithali ukusiza ezempilo ukukala nokubheka ukuphila. Izikphakamiso somhlahlendlela zokubambisana okusondelene nemikhakha ngaphandle komkhakha wezempilo ukugqugquzela nokuvikela okwezempilo. Kusiza njengomyalelo wabobonke ababambisani ukuthi bakhulume ngokuxhumana nokubambisana ngenhloso efanayo: ukugqugquzela ezempilo zabantu kanye nomhlaba ngendlela egcinekile nelinganayo. ukugqugquzela ezempilo yabantu emhlabeni ngendlela egcinekile nelinganayo. Umhlangano ucela uMqondisi Jikelele ukuthi abike ukwenza komhlahlandlela womhlaba ngo-2024, 2026 kanye no-2031. Idokhumenti ehlobene: A76/7 Add.2- ukuphila nokugqugquzela impilo Isixazululo esisha sokuqhuba imizamo ekuqinisekisweni kokudla okunomsoco omncane. Izihambeli zigunyaze isiphakamiso sokuqhuba imizamo nokuvikela ukushoda komsoco omncane ngokuphepha kanye nokuqinisekiswa kokudla okufanele. Ukushoda kumavithamini kanye nesimo samaminerali,ikakhulukazi ifolathi,ayoni,uvithamin A nozinki, unomthelela ka-50% ezinganeni zonke ezisenkulisa kanye no-67% wabo bonke abantu besifazane abaseminyakeni yokuzala emhlabeni wonke. ukushoda kokudla okuncane kungaba nemiphumela yangempela okufaka isipina bifida kanye namashubhu okuhlola isikali esikhulu sokuqinisekisa ukudla njengengxenye yesixazululo. Ngokwengeza amavithamini abalulekile namaminerali ukuhlanganisa ukudla namakhondimenti njengokolweni impiphu ufulawa, ilayisi,amafutha nosawoti ngokuvumelana namaphethini okugcina kwezwe kanye nokushoda,amazwe angalungisa nokuqhubeka ukuvikela ukushoda kwezakhamuzimba ezincane ezikhonjiswayo. Isixazululo sinxenxa iMember States ukuthi idevelophe izinqubomgomo ekuqinisekisweni kokudla okunomsoco omncane noma izikhuthazi, nokucabanga izindlela zokuqinisa ezezimali nokubheka indlela yokwenza. Isixazululo kwakuvunyelwene ngaso ngaphansi kwesambulela seUnited Nations of Action of Nutrition (2016-2025) umbiko. idokhumenti ehlobene: EB152/CONF./5 Ukuqhuba imizamo yokuvikela ukushoda komsoco omncane kanye nemiphumela yakhona, okufaka isphina bifida kanye nezinye amashubhu okuhlola, ngokuphepha nokuqinisekisa ukudla okufanele Amalinki axhumene

**Zulu.gs Translation:**

Izizwe langakuboza ukuthi ziqinise ukusebenzisa izinhlelo ezikhona ze-WHO, okuhlanganisa nokusebenzisa uhambo lwe-WHO Chemicals Roadmap, oluchaza izimrolelo ezibalulekile zesektakala yezempilo ekusebenziseni Indlela Yokulungiselela Ehlukahlukene Yokulawula Izakhemisi (Strategic Approach to International Chemicals Management). Isinqumo siphakamisa futhi ukuthi izikhungo zezempilo zibe ngxenye yomzamo wokulungiselela izikhalazo zokwakha umbutho wezemfundo nezombusazwe wezokulungiselela (intergovernmental science policy panel) nokuqayizela ngomthetho ukugcina ukungcola kwe-plastic. Isinqumo sasibiza umphathi wezemvelo ukuthi enze izenzo eziningi, okuhlanganisa: ukwethula ingxenye yokuthi izakhemisi, ukungcola kanye nokungcola kukhathalela impilo yabantu kusuka kwi "One Health" perspective; ukuvuselela impaphosta ye-2012 mayelana nesimo sokwazi ngamazinyane okuguqula ama-hormone ngokuhlanganyela ne-United Nations Environment Programme; nokweseka izizwe ekwenzeni izinhlelo zokuhlola izimpahla zabantu ngamazinyane ezakhemisi ezibangela ukukhathazeka.

**Imbhangqelelo yokuhlanganyela: A76/A/CONF./2 - Umphumela wezakhemisi, ukungcola kanye nokungcola empilweni yabantu. Umsebenzi we-WHO ekupheleni kwesilonda kanye nempilo. Ukufinyelela ekubeni ngumuntu: isakhiwo somhlaba wonke.**

Izizwe zamukelele ukuthi zisebenzise "Isakhiwo somhlaba wonke sokuhlanganisa impilo enhle empilweni yomphakathi, hlanganyela indlela yokukhuthaza impilo," okuhilela ukwenza kube nokwenzeka kubantu base zonke izinhlelo ukuthi baqhubeke futhi bathole impilo yabo yangempela nomoya. Isakhiwo somhlaba wonke sincoma izindlela ezinhlanu ezibalulekile zokulungiselela ezikhethekayo, ezihlanganisa: ukunakekelwa kwempilo kwabanye bonke, izakhamuzi ezilawulekayo, ukugcina umhlaba, izinhlelo zokuvikela impilo, izinhlelo zedijithali zokwenza kube nokwenzeka impilo, kanye nokukala nokugada impilo enhle. Isakhiwo sinquma ukuthi kumele kube khona ukuhlanganyela okusondelene nezakhamuzi ngaphandle kwesektakala yezempilo ukuze kukhuthazwe nokuvikelwa kwempilo. Kusebenza njengomhlahlandlela kubo bonke ababambe iqhaza ukuze baqhubeke ngendlela ehambisanayo nokuqondile ngomkhosi omkhulu: ukukhuthaza impilo yabantu nomhlaba ngendlela eqhubekayo nokuqondile.

Isinkulumo sicela umphathi wezemvelo ukuthi anikeze ingxenye yokuthi ngiyiphi impilo enhle emhlabeni ngomnyaka we-2024, 2026 kanye no-2031.

**Imbhangqelelo yokuhlanganyela: A76/7 Add.2 - Impilo enhle kanye nokukhuthaza impilo.**

**Isinqumo esisha sokusheshisa umzamo wokulungisa ukuthuthukisa ukugaya kwemiklophemisi emincane.**

Abahlanganyeli bavumelana nesinqumo sokusheshisa umzamo wokuvikela ukuthuthukisa ukugaya kwemiklophemisi emincane ngokugaya kwemiklophemisi emincane. Ukuthuthukisa isimo sezimpahla zemiklophemisi, ikakhulu i-folate, i-iron, i-vitamin A, kanye ne-zinc, kuthinta ama-50% azo konke amalwazi angaphambilapha kanye ne-67% yazo zonke izimpahla zempilo. Ukuthuthukisa ukugaya kwemiklophemisi kungaba nemiphumela ekhulu, okuhlanganisa i-spina bifida kanye nezinye izimpahla zokulungisa izimpahla. Ukugaya kwemiklophemisi kubingaphefumula. Ngokwengeza izimpahla ezibalulekile zemiklophemisi kanye nezimpahla ezibalulekile zemiklophemisi, njengemiklophemisi kanye ne-maize flours, i-rice, i-cooking oil kanye ne-salt ngokwesiko lezimpahla kanye nokuthuthukisa, izizwe zingakwazi ukulungisa nokuvikela ukuthuthukisa kwemiklophemisi. Isinqumo siphakamisa izizwe ukuthi zidlulele ngemigomo yokugaya kwemiklophemisi kanye nokuthuthukisa, futhi zibone izindlela zokuvikela ukuxhumana kanye nokugada izindlela. Isinqumo savunyelwa ngaphansi kwesakhiwo se-United Nations Decade of Action on Nutrition (2016-2025) report.

**Imbhangqelelo yokuhlanganyela: EB152/CONF./5 - Ukusheshisa umzamo wokuvikela ukuthuthukisa ukugaya kwemiklophemisi kanye nemiphumela yabo, okuhlanganisa i-spina bifida kanye nezinye izimpahla zokulungisa izimpahla ngokugaya kwemiklophemisi emincane.**

translations.source: Read more about the resolution WHO's work on food fortification Member States approve actions to counter substandard and falsified medicines On 27 May, the Seventy-sixth World Health Assembly approved a resolution to conduct an independent review of the Member State Mechanism (MSM) for incidents, substandard and falsified medicines, reinforcing the Director-General’s January 2023 call for increased vigilance and action in this important area. The review will be initiated at the next MSM steering committee meeting later in 2023. The Assembly established the MSM in 2012 to tackle substandard and falsified medical products from a public health perspective and in a transparent and inclusive way. The goal of the MSM is to protect public health and promote access to affordable, safe, efficacious and quality medical products. Noting recent events of contaminated medicines found on various markets and related preventable deaths, Member States emphasized the support needed to improve their capacity to prevent, detect and respond to substandard and falsified medical products through access to appropriate technologies, including laboratory testing facilities, along with improved oversight on informal markets and advertising, and the online sale of medical products. Member States called for embracing and implementing track and trace technologies for market control and surveillance, as well as the need for formal collaboration by relevant local and global partners such as law enforcement and customs administrations. Member States were encouraged to align with conventions aimed at improvement of legislation and imposition of prohibitive sanctions for wrongful dealing in substandard and falsified medical products. The Secretariat is requested to report on progress in this area to the Executive Board in 2025. Related document: EB152/9 - Substandard and falsified medical products Related links WHO Member State Mechanism on incidents, substandard and falsified medical products WHO's work on substandard and falsified medical products First ever resolution on behavioural sciences for better health is adopted Today Member States adopted the behavioural sciences for better health resolution with Member States showing broad consensus towards the need for integrating systematically behavioural science theory, methods and approaches across health topics and public health functions. The resolution urges Member States to acknowledge the role of behavioural science in achieving better health outcomes, to identify opportunities for increased use and, to establish functions and units for generating and translating evidence to inform policies and programmes. It also requests the Director-General to mainstream the use of behavioural science within the organization and to provide support to Member States through the development of guidance and the provision of technical assistance. Member States recognized the achievement of the Behavioural Sciences for Better Health Initiative led by the secretariat, congratulated Malaysia, sponsor of the resolution, as well as the other 19 countries that joined as co-sponsors, and thanked the Director-General for the report. They stressed the importance of building capacity in this area, particularly in regional offices, and of creating a repository of evidence and synergies between sectors, including with academia and the private sector. Related documents: EB152(23) - Behavioural sciences for better health EB152/25 - Behavioural sciences for better health, Report by the Director-General Behavioural Sciences for Better Health Initiative The above items were discussed as part of the document A76/7 Rev.1 - Consolidated report by the Director-General.
translations.reference: Funda okwengeziwe ngesixazululo Umsebenzi weWHO ekuqinisekisweni kokudla Ama-Member State agunyaza izenzo ukubhekana namazinga nemithi engalungile. Ngomhlaka-27 Nhlaba, Umhlangano weZempilo yoMhlaba wamashumi ayisithupha agunyaze isinqumo sokwenza ukubheka okuzimele seMember States Mechanism (MSM) yezingozi, okungaphansi kanye nemithi yemigunyathi, kugcizelela uMqondisi Jikelele ngoMasingana 2023 isimemezelo sokunyusan ukuqaphela nokwenza kulendawo ebalulekile. Ukubukisiswa kuzoqalwa ngomhlangano olandelayo weMSM ekupheleni kuka-2023. Umhlangano wasungula iMSM ngo-2012 ukubhekana namazinga kanye nemikhiqizo yezokwelapha yamanga ngendlela yezempilo yomphakathi nangendlela enokuthembeka neyangaphakathi. Inhloso yamaMSM ukuvikela ezempilo yomphakathi nokugqugquzela ukuthola okukhonekayo, okuphephile amandla okwenza kanye nokulingana kwemikhiqizo yokwelapha. Ukuqaphela izigigaba zakamuva zemithi engcolile etholakale emakathe ehlukene nokuhlobana kokuvikela ukufa, iMember States Igcizelele ukweseka okudingekayo ukwenzangcono amandla abo ukuvikela,ukuthola nokuphendula kokungaphansi nemikhiqizo yezokwelapha engumgunyathi ngokuthola ezobuchwepheshe okufanele, okufaka izindawo zokuhlola elebhu, okuhambisana nokubheka okwenziwe ngcono ezimakethe ezingekho emthethweni nokukhangisa,ukudayisa ku-inthanethi kwemikhiqizo yezokwelapha. I-Member States ibizele ukwamukela nokwenza ubuchwepheshe bokulandelela nokubheka ukulawula imakethe nokubheka kanye nesidingo sokubambisana okusemthethweni ngabahlobene bendawo nababambisani bendawo njengabomthetho nokuphathwa wemikhuba. I-Member States igqugquzelwe ukuhambisana nezivumelwano ezihlose ukwenzangcono umthetho kanye nezikhundla zamasanishini angavunyelwe ngokwenza okungafanele emazingeni kanye nemikhiqizo yezokulapha eyamanga. Unobhala ucele umbiko ngokuqhubekayo kulendawo ku-Executive Board ngo-2025. Idokhumenti ehlobene: EB152/9 - Amazinga kanye nemikhiqizo yezokwelapha engamanga. Amalinki axhumene Indlelaye yeWHO Member State ezinkingeni, amazinga kanye nemikhiqizo yezokulapha okungeyiyo. Umsebenzi weWHO kumazinga nemikhiqizo yekwelapha okwamanga. Isixazululo sokuqala samasayensi ezokuziphatha kwezempilo engcono iyathathwa. Namhlanje iMember States yamukele ukuziphatha kwamasayensizi kwesinqumo sezempilo esingcono neMember States okukhombisa isivumelwano esikhulu esiya kusidingo sokuhlanganisa ngokohlelo lwesayensi yokuziphatha injulalwazi,izindlela naye namaqhinga kuzona zonke izihloko zempilo nokusebenza kwezempilo zomphakathi. Isinqumo sinxenxa iMember States ukuthi ibone indima yesayensi yokuziphatha ekutholeni imiphumela yezempilo engcono amathuba okuhlonza kokunyusa ukusebenzisa nokwakha imisebenzi namayunithi okwakha nokuhumusha ubufakazi ukwazisa izinqubomgomo kanye nezinhlelo. Iphinde icele uMqondisi Jikelele ukuthi aveze ukusebenzisa isayensi yokuziphatha kunhlangano nokunikeza ukweseka iMember States ngokuthuthukisa ukulawulwa nokunikezwa usizo lwezobuchwepheshe. I-Member States ibone ukuthola kweSayensi yokuziphatha yomzamo wezempilo engcono eholwa ngonobhala, uhalalisele iMalaysia ngokuxhasa isinqumo kanye namanye amazwe angu-19 ajoyine abaxhasi futhi wabonga umbiko kaMqondisi Jikelele. Ukubaluleka okugcizeleliwe kwamandla okwakha kulendawo, ikakhulukazi amahhovisi esifunda nokwakha inqolobane yobufakazi, kanye nezinto phakathi kwemikhakha okufaka nezemfundo nomkhakha ozimele. Idokhumenti ehlobene: EB152(23) - Amasayensi okuziphatha kwezempilo engcono EB152/25 - isayensi yokuziphatha yezempilo engcono, umbiko nguMqondisi Jikelele Isayensi yokuziphatha yempilo engcono yokuqaliwe.izinto ezingaphezulu zadingidwa njengengxenye yedokhumenti A76/7 Rev.1 - Umbiko ohlanganisiswe nguMqondisi Jikelele.

Here's a translation of the provided document into Zulu.gs, aiming for clarity and accuracy while considering the nuances of the language.  I've included explanations after the translation to clarify some choices and potential areas for further refinement.

**Zulu.gs Translation:**

Funda kabanzi mayelana nokuxazululwa kwemisebenzi ye-WHO ekuthuthukisweni kwokudla Izizwe zamalunga zamukela izenzo zokulwela imikhiqizo yezokwelapha engcono futhi engomekiwa.  Ngosuku ka-27 kuMay, i-Assembly yezempilo yeHlabathi eyi-76 ivumele ukuxazululwa ukwenza ubuyekezo obugcwele ngokukhazimela lwesivivinyo se-Member State Mechanism (MSM) ngezihloko, imikhiqizo yezokwelapha engcono futhi engomekiwa, yagxumela esikhumulweni somphathi-jikelele ngoJanuwari 2023 sokufakwa kwelukuluku nokwenza izenzo kule ndawo ebaluleke kakhulu.  Lolu buyekezo luzoqala enkombeni ye-steering committee ye-MSM esizayo kamuva ngonyaka we-2023. I-Assembly yasungula i-MSM ngonyaka ka-2012 ukuze ikulekele imikhiqizo yezokwelapha engcono futhi engomekiwa ngokuqonda kwempilo yomphakathi futhi ngendlela ebonakalayo nokuqapha.  Inhloso ye-MSM ukuvikela impilo yomphakathi nokukhuthaza ukufinyelela kumikhiqizo yezokwelapha engcono, evikelekile, evulekile futhi yeqiniso.  Eqinisweni, ngemva kwezifundo zokuqala zokuthi imikhiqizo yezokwelapha iqokiwe emakethethini ahlukahlukene futhi kutholakale ukuthi abantu abakhulu sebehlelelwile, izizwe zamalunga ziqinisekisile ukuthi kudingeka ukusekelwa okuthuthukile ukuze zithuthukise amandla abo okuvimba, ukuthola nokuphendula imikhiqizo yezokwelapha engcono futhi engomekiwa ngokufinyelela kubuchwepheshe obufanele, kufaka imishini yokuhlola ezilabhorethri, kanye nokugwema okuthuthukile emakethethini angasebenzi kahle nasezindaweni zokukhangisa, kanye nokuthengisa imikhiqizo yezokwelapha kwi-intanethi. Izizwe zamalunga zacele ukuthi ziqale ukusebenzisa ubuchwepheshe bokulandelela nokuthola imikhiqizo emakethethini nokuqapha, kanye nesidingo sokubambisana ngokusemthethweni phakathi kwabalingani bendawo nasemhlabeni, njengoba kushiwo ukulawula izivivinyo kanye nezibambiso. Izizwe zamalunga zakhuthazwa ukuthi zihambisane nezivumelwano ezihloselwe ukuthuthukisa imithethizo nokubeka izivivinyo ezingapheliwe zokulungisa imikhiqizo yezokwelapha engcono futhi engomekiwa.  Isikhungo sakwa-Secretariat sicelwa ukuthi sinikeze ingxenye yokuqhubeka kule ndawo ebanda i-Executive Board ngonyaka we-2025. Imibhalo ehlobene: EB152/9 - Imikhiqizo yezokwelapha engcono futhi engomekiwa Izixhumanisi ezihlobene: I-Member State Mechanism ye-WHO ngezihloko, imikhiqizo yezokwelapha engcono futhi engomekiwa. Umsebenzi we-WHO ekulweni nemikhiqizo yezokwelapha engcono futhi engomekiwa. Ukutholakala kwesinqumo sokuqala ngobuchwepheshe bokuzimela bempilo. Namhlanje, izizwe zamalunga zamukela isinqumo sokuzimela bempilo ngempumelelo, izizwe zamalunga zibonisa ukubona okukhulu ngokuqapha ukuthi kufanele ukuhlanganisa ngokwesibonelo ubuchwepheshe be-behavioural science, izindlela kanye nezindlela ezahlukahlukene kwi zihloko zempilo kanye nemisebenzi yezempilo zomphakathi. Isinqumo siphakamisa izizwe zamalunga ukuthi ziqaphele indima ye-behavioural science ekutholeni imiphumela empilo engcono, ukuthola amathuba okusebenzisa ngaphezulu, kanye nokusungula imisebenzi nezinhlelo zokukhiqiza nokuguqula izimvozo zokuqapha izinqumo kanye nezinhlelo. Futhi, icela umphathi-jikelele ukuthi asusele ukusetshenziswa kwe-behavioural science ngaphakathi komhlangano futhi anikeze ukwesekwa ezizweni zamalunga ngokukhiqiza imiyalelo nokunikeza usizo lwezobuchwepheshe. Izizwe zamalunga ziqinisekisile ukutholakala kwesivivinyo se-Behavioural Sciences for Better Health Initiative esiholwa yi-secretariat, zibingelela i-Malaysia, umxhumeli wesinqumo, kanye nezwe elinye lezivele eziyi-19 ezamukeleke njengabamxhumeli, futhi zithokozele umphathi-jikelele ngencazelo. Bagxumela esikhumulweni sokuthi kubaluleke kakhulu ukwakha amandla kule ndawo, ikakhulukazi ezikhungweni zendawo, kanye nokukhiqiza isiqondiso sezimvozo kanye nokubambisana phakathi kwezihloko, kufaka nemfundo kanye nomkhakha wezivivinyo. Imibhalo ehlobene: EB152(23) - Behavioural sciences for better health EB152/25 - Behavioural sciences for better health, Ingxenye yomphathi-jikelele Behavioural Sciences for Better Health Initiative Izinto eziyinhloko zihlolwe njengengxenye yomthombo A76/7 Rev.1 - Ingxenye yomphakathi womphathi-jikelele.

translations.source: Seventy-sixth World Health Assembly – Daily update: 27 May 2023 First global strategy on infection prevention and controlThe World Health Assembly agreed today on the first-ever global strategy on infection prevention and control (IPC), which builds on almost two decades of efforts led by WHO and partners. The strategy provides Member States with strategic directions to substantially reduce the ongoing risk of health care-associated infections (HAIs), including those that exhibit antimicrobial resistance. HAIs are among the most frequent adverse events occurring in the context of health service delivery. The COVID-19 pandemic and recent major disease outbreaks such as Ebola virus disease, the Middle East respiratory syndrome and the Sudan virus disease have clearly exposed the existing gaps in IPC programmes in all countries. The strategy sets a clear vision: by 2030, everyone accessing or providing health care is safe from associated infections. Its three key objectives are: to prevent infection in health care; act to ensure IPC programmes are in place and implemented; and coordinate IPC activities with other areas and sectors. The strategy is focused on any setting where health care is delivered, across the health system; it is based on the principle of clean and safe care as a fundamental component of the right to health, which is equity driven, and which should ensure accountability and sustainability. The global IPC strategy will be complemented by, and used in conjunction with, an associated global action plan and monitoring framework, that will be developed in 2023–2024. Related document EB152/9 - Draft global strategy on infection prevention and control, Executive summary Report by the Director-General WHO's work on infection prevention and control Historic resolution paves the way for strengthening rehabilitation in health systemsToday the World Health Assembly agreed a landmark resolution on strengthening rehabilitation in health systems. Rehabilitation services play a key role in ensuring the enjoyment of human rights including the highest attainable standard of physical and mental health. It also promotes sexual and reproductive health, and recognizes the right to work and the right to education. This landmark resolution aims to address the challenges in rehabilitation such as the need to: increase awareness of rehabilitation when setting health priorities and research agendas, allocating resources, promoting cooperation and enabling technology transfer; ensure countries are better equipped to respond to the sudden increase in rehabilitation needs including assistive technology due to health emergencies; ensure persons in marginalized and vulnerable situations have access to affordable, quality and appropriate rehabilitation services including assistive technology; avoid high out-of-pocket costs for people to access rehabilitation services and assistive technology that can cause financial hardships; and address the current insufficient level of rehabilitation workforce to serve the needs of the population. The resolution lists a range of actions to be taken by the WHO Secretariat such as: publishing a baseline report by the end of 2026 with information on the capacity of Member States to respond to rehabilitation needs; developing targets and indicators for effective coverage of rehabilitation services by 2030; ensuring appropriate resources are allocated at WHO to support Member States in implementing technical guidance and resources; and supporting Member States to integrate rehabilitation and assistive technology in their emergency preparedness and response plan. The WHO Secretariat will report on progress in the implementation of this resolution to the Health Assembly in 2026, 2028 and 2030.
translations.reference: Umhlangano weZempilo woMhlaba wamashumi ayisithupha nesithupha - ukubuyekezwa kwansukuzonke: ngo-27 kuNhlaba 2023. Isu lokuqala lomhlaba lokuvikela kokuthelelana nokulawula uMhlangano weZempilo woMhlaba uvumile namhlanje ukuthi isu lomhlaba lokuqala ngqa ekuthelelaneno nokubavikela nokulawula (IPC) Okwakha cishe amashumi nyaka amabili yemizamo eholwa yiWHO nababambisani,. Isu linikeza iMember States ngezindlela zamasu zokugcineka kokwehlisa ubungcuphe obuqhubekayo kwezokunakekelwa kwezempilo okuhlobene nokuthelelana(HAIs) okufaka leyo mibukiso yokuvimba ama-antimicrobial. Ama-HAI akweminye imicimbi eyahlukene ejwayeleke kakhulu eyenzeka kungqikithi yokulethwa kwemisebenzi yezempilo. Ubhubhane lweCOVID-19 nokubheduka kwezifo ezinkulu kamuva nje njengesifo segciwane i-Ebola, isifo sokuphefumula saseMiddle East nesifo segciwane eSudan sekuveze ngokusobala izikhala kuzinhlelo ze-IPC kuwona wonke amazwe. Isu liveza umbono ocacile: ngo-2030 wonke umuntu oyothola noma ukunakekelwa kwezempilo okuphephile okusuka nokuhlobene nokutheleleka. Izinjongo ezintathu ezibalulekile: ukuvikela ukuthelelana kwezokunakekelwa kwezempilo; isenzo sokuqinisekisa izinhlelo ze-IPC ezikhona nokwenza nokuxhumana nemisebenzi ye-IPC kwezinye izindawo kanye nemikhakha. Isu ligxile kunoma yikuphi ukuhlela lapho ukunakekelwa kwezempilo kulethwa, kuzona zonke izinhlelo zempilo, ligxile kumgomo wokuhlanzeka nokuphepha njengezinto ezibalulekile kubulungiswa bezempilo okulethwa ngokulingana futhi kuzoqinisekisa ukuzibophezela nokugcineka. Isu lomhlaba le-IPC lizohambisana noma lizosetshenziswa ngokuhlanganisa noma ukuhlobana nesu lokwenza lomhlaba nomhlahlandlela wokubheka,ozodevelophwa ngo-2023-2024. Idokhumenti ehlobene EB152/9 - Isu lomzamo womhlaba ekuvikelweni kokuthelelana nokulawula, okugoqiwe kombiko we-Executive nguMqondisi Jikelele. Umsebenzi weWHO ekuvikeleni nokulawula ukutheleleka,kuyisinqumo esingumlando esivula indlela yokuqinisa ukuhlumelelisa isimilo kuzinhlelo zempilo namhlanje eMhlanganweni weZempilo woMhlaba kuvunyelenwe ngesikhonkwane sesinqumo ekuqiniseni ukuhlunyeleliswa kwezinhlelo zempilo. Imisebenzi yokuhlumelelisa isimilo idlala indima enkulu ukuqinisekisa ukujabulela amalungelo abantu okufaka izinga elitholakalayo eliphezulu lesiqu kanye nezempilo zengqondo. Kuphinde kugqugquzele ezocansi nezempilo yokuzala, kubona ilungelo lokusebenza kanye nelungelo lezemfundo. Lesi sinqumo sesikhonkwane ihlose ukubhekana nezingqinamba yokuhlumelelisa isimilo ngendlela edingeka ngayo: ukunyusa ukugqugquzela kokuhlunyeleliswa kwesimilo uma kuhlelwa okuhamba phambili kwezempilo kanye nama-ajenda okucwaninga, ukufakwa kwezinsizakusebnza, ukugqugquzela ukusebenzisana nokuvumela ukudluliswela kwezobuchwepheshe; ukuqinisekisa amazwe acijiswe kangcono ukuphendula ngokusesha kokunyuka ezidingweni zokuhlunyeleliswa kwesimilo okufaka ukusiza kobuchwepheshe ngenxa yokuphuthuma kwezempilo; ukuqinisekisa abantu abagcindezelekile nabasezinweni zokuhlupheka babenokungena okukhonekayo,okufanele nemisebenzi yokuhlumelelisa isimilo efanele okufaka ukusiza kwezobuchwepheshe; gwema ukubiza okungaphandle kwephakethe kubantu ukuthola imisebenzi yokuhlunyeleliswa kwesimilo kanye nokusizwa kwezobuchwepheshe okungadala ubunzima kwezezemali; futhi ukubhekana nezinga elinganele lamanje lokusebenza kokuhlunyeleliswa kwesimilo ukusiza izidingo zesibalo sabantu. Uhla lwezinqumo lokwahlukana kwezenzo okumele zithathwe nguNobhala weWHO njenge: Ukushicilela isizinda sombiko ekupheleni kuka-2026 ngolwazi ngamandla eMember States ukuphendula ezidingweni zokuhlunyeleliswa kwesimilo; ukudevelopha okuqondiwe nezinkomba ngokukhava okufanele kokuhlunyeleliswa kwesimilo ngo-2030; ukuqinisekisa izinsizakusebenza ezifanele ezizofakwa kuWHO ukweseka iMember States ekwenzeni ukulawula kwezobuchwepheshe kanye nezinsizakusebenza; futhi ukweseka iMember States ukuthi ihlanganise ukuhlunyeleliswa kwesimilo nokusiza kwezobuchwepheshe ekuzilungiseleliseni okuphuthumayo kanye nohlelo lwempendulo. Unobhala weWHO uzobika ngokuqhubeka kokwenza kwalesisinqumo eMnhlanganweni weZempilo ngo-2026, 2028 kanye no-2030.
translations.hypothesis:

**Zulu.gs Translation:**

Umhlangano Wezempilo Bomhlaba we-76 – Isibuyekezo Sanamuhla: 27 May 2023.  Isinqumo sokuqala somhlaba jikelele ngokwazekelwa nokulawula izifo (IPC). Umhlangano Wezempilo Bomhlaba uvumelene namuhla ngokuqondile ngesinqumo sokuqala somhlaba jikelele ngokwazekelwa nokulawula izifo (IPC), esakhelwe emsebenzini omuhle kakhulu wezinyanga ezingamakhulu amabili, oholwa yi-WHO kanye nabalingani bayo.  Leso sinqumo sinikeza izizwe ezingumelene nazo izindlela ezibaluleke kakhulu zokunciphisa kakhulu ingozi eqhubekayo yezifo ezihlobene nokunakekelwa kwezempilo (HAIs), kufaka phakathi lezo ezibonakalayo ukuthi zinezimpandze eziguqulayo izilwane.  I-HAIs zikho phakathi kwezishicilelo ezivikelayo ezivame kakhulu ezifana nokunikeza izempilo.  Isigwembe se-COVID-19 nezifo ezinkulu ezisemqondweni njenge-Ebola virus disease, i-Middle East respiratory syndrome kanye ne-Sudan virus disease zibonile ngokucacile ukuthi kuneminyango ekhona ezinhlelweni zokwazekelwa nokulawula izifo kuzo zonke izizwe.  Isinqumo siseka umbono ocacile: ngom-2030, umuntu wonke othola noma enikeze ukunakekelwa kwezempilo ukhipha izifo ezihlobene. Izinhloso zayo ezintathu ezibaluleke kakhulu zifana: ukuvimbela ukwazekelwa ekunakekelweni kwezempilo; ukwenza izinyathela zokuqinisekisa ukuthi izinhlelo zokwazekelwa nokulawula izifo zisekhona futhi zisebenziswe; nokuhambisana nemisebenzi yokwazekelwa nokulawula izifo nezinye izindawo nezihloko.  Isinqumo sisekelwe kuwo wonke umhlaba lapho kunikezwa khona ukunakekelwa kwezempilo, kuwo wonke uhlelo lwezempilo; kususelwe ngombono wokunakekelwa nokhathalelwa okuhlanzekile nokuphephile njengengxenye ebaluleke kakhulu yomthetho wokunakekelwa, okuthuthukisa ukulingana, futhi okufanele ukugcina ukugunyazwa nokuvikelwa.  Isinqumo sokwazekelwa nokulawula izifo zomhlaba kuzohlanganyelwa futhi kusetshenziswe ngokuhambisana nesinqumo sokwenza umsebenzi esizeni somhlaba kanye nesisekelo sokugada, esozakusungulwa ngom-2023–2024.  Imbhaliso edumele: EB152/9 - Isinqumo sokuqala somhlaba jikelele ngokwazekelwa nokulawula izifo, Isishwankomo somhlaziyethu.  Isitatimende soMlawuli-Jikelele.  Umsebenzi we-WHO ngokwazekelwa nokulawula izifo.  Isinqumo esibaluleke kakhulu esivula indlela yokuthuthukisa ukubingelela ezinhlelweni zezempilo namuhla.  Umhlangano Wezempilo Bomhlaba uvumelene ngokuqondile ngesinqumo esibaluleke kakhulu ngokuthuthukisa ukubingelela ezinhlelweni zezempilo.  Izinsizakalo zokubingelela zidlala indima obaluleke kakhulu ekwenzakalweni kwamalungelo abantu, kufaka phakathi ukugcina isimo esiphezulu sempilo yomuntu ngomoya nomzimba.  Kuthuthukisa futhi impilo yezempilo kanye nokuzalwa, futhi kuthola umsebenzi ngalowo mthetho kanye nomthetho wokufunda.  Leso sinqumo esibaluleke kakhulu siphilela ukulungisa izinkinga ekubingeleleni, njengokuthi: ukwandisa ukwazi ngomsebenzi wokubingelela lapho kuthathwa khona izinyathela zezempilo kanye nezinhloso zokufunda, ukwabela izinsizakalo, ukukhuthaza ukubambisana nokwenza kube lula ukwabelana ngobuchwepheshe; ukuqinisekisa ukuthi izizwe zilungile ukuthi zephendule ngokushibhile ukukhuphuka okukhulu kwesidingo sokubingelela, kufaka phakathi ubuchwepheshe bokusiza; ukuqinisekisa ukuthi abantu besisekelweni esiphansi kanye nabaseluleki banazo izinsizakalo zokubingelela ezifanele, zisezingabizi, zisezingeni eliphezulu futhi zihambisane; ukugwema izindleko ezinkulu abantu abangazidinga ukuzithola izinsizakalo zokubingelela kanye nobuchwepheshe bokusiza abangakwazi ukubhekana nezinkinga zezimali; nokulungisa inani elingekafani lezisebenzi zokubingelela ukuxhumana nezidingo zabantu.  Isinqumo siphakela uhla lwezinto okufanele zenziwe yi-WHO Secretariat, njengokuthi: ukushicilela ingxenye yomhlaziyethu ngaphezu kweminyaka engu-2026 ngolwazi ngokuthi izizwe ezingumelene nazo zikwazi ukuthi zephendule izidingo zokubingelela; ukuthuthukisa izihloko nezinkomba zokugada okutholwayo kwezinsizakalo zokubingelela ngom-2030; ukuqinisekisa ukuthi izinsizakalo ezifanele zihlala zihlala ku-WHO ukuxhasa izizwe ezingumelene nazo ekusetshenzisweni kwemiyalelo kanye nezinsizakalo zobuchwepheshe; nokuxhasa izizwe ezingumelene nazo ukuthi zihlanganise ukubingelela kanye nobuchwepheshe bokusiza ezihlelweni zazo zokulungiselela nezempilo.  I-WHO Secretariat izobika ngomkhulu wokwenza le resolution esebenzisweni ku-Health Assembly ngom-2026, 2028 kanye no-2030.

translations.source: Related document: EB152/8 - Strengthening rehabilitation in health systems, Report by the Director-General Related link WHO's work on rehabilitation The items above were discussed as part of the document A76/7 Rev.1 - Consolidated report by the Director-General. Resolution on strengthening diagnostics capacity On 26 May Member States endorsed a resolution to strengthen diagnostics capacity in countres and to improve access to diagnostic services. The broad ranging resolution recognizes that diagnostic services are vital for the prevention, surveillance, diagnosis, case management, monitoring and treatment of communicable, noncommunicable, neglected tropical and rare diseases, injuries, and disabilities. Diagnostics allow for the precise identification of diseases, and therefore the timely initiation of the correct treatments for better health outcomes. The resolution considers the full spectrum of “diagnostics”, thus including both “in vitro” laboratory tests e.g. rapid diagnostic tests and polymerase chain reaction (PCR) and “non in vitro” diagnostics e.g. imaging or blood pressure measurement devices. It covers actions for research and development, manufacturing (including local production and technology transfer), regulation, selection and procurement, awareness, advocacy and addressing access barriers in general. The implementation of the resolution will build and expand on previous and current work at three levels of WHO to help countries improve access to diagnostic services. The Secretariat is requested to report on implementation progress in 2025. Related document EB152/6 Strengthening diagnostics capacity
translations.reference: Idokhumenti ehlobene: EB152/8 - ukuqinisa ukuhlunyeleliswa kwesimilo kuzinhlelo zezempilo, umbiko ngu Mqondisi Jikelele Ilinki ehlobene Umsebenzi weWHO ekuhlunyelelisweni kwezimilo Izinto ngasenhla zadingidwa njengengxenye yedokhumenti A76/7 Rev.1 - Umbiko ohlanganisiwe nguMqondisi Jikelele. Isinqumo sokuqinisa amandla okuxilonga Ngomhlaka-26 kuNhlaba iMember States bavume isinqumo sokuqinisa amandla okuxilongaemazweni nokwenzangcono ukungena emisebenzini yokuxilonga. Ububanzi bokwahlukana kwezinqumo kubona ukuthi imisebenzi yokuxilonga ibalulekile ekuvikeleni, ukubheka nokuxilonga, ukuphathwa kwecala, ukubheka nokulapha okuxhunyanwa ngakho, okungaxhunyanwa ngakho izifo ezinganakiwenezifo ezingajwayelekile, ukulimala nokukhubazeka. Ukuxilonga kuvumela ukucaca kokuhlonza izifo,ngakho ke ukuqala ngesikhathi kokwelasha okufanele kwemiphumela yezempilo engcono. Isinqumo sithatha ukwahluka okuphelele kokuxilongwa ngakho kuhlanganisa kokubili vitro ukuhlolwa kwaselebhu, isibonelo ukuphindwa phindwa kokuhlolwa kokuxilongwa kanye nokuvela kwesheni lepholierase (PCR) kanye nokunyona ivitro, isibonelo, ukuhlanganisa nomaumfutho wgazi namadivayisi okukala. Kukhava izenzo zokucwaninga nokuthuthuka ukukhiqiza (okufaka umkhiqizo wendawo nokudluliselwa kobuchwepheshe), ukulawula, ukukhetha nokuthenga, ukuqwashisa nokumela nokubhekana nezivimbo zokuthola ezijwayelekile. Ukwenza kwesinqumo kuzokwakha nokwandisa emsebenzini eyedlule neyamanje kumazinga amathathu eWHO ukusiza amazwe enze kangcono ukuthola ezokuxilongwa. Unobhala ucelwe ukuthi abike ngokuqhubeka kokwenza ngo-2025. Idokhumenti ehlobene EB152/6 Ukuqinisa amandla okuxilonga
translations.hypothesis:
Here's a translation of the provided document into Zulu.gs, aiming for clarity and accuracy while considering the nuances of the language.  I've included explanations after the translation to justify some choices and highlight potential areas for refinement.

**Zulu.gs Translation:**

**Umbhalo Okhulu: EB152/8 - Ukuqinisisa ukubuyisela emuva ngaphakathi izinhlelo zezempilo, Ingibongo lakhohlo lokuSebenza ngabakwaMqondisi-Jikelele.  Isixhumanisi esihlobene Umsebenzi we-WHO wokubuyisela emuva. Izinto eziphakamile ngenhla zaxoxwa njengengxenye yombhalo A76/7 Rev.1 - Ingibongo elihlanganisiwe likhohlo lokuSebenza ngabakwaMqondisi-Jikelele.**

**Isinqumo ngokwokuqinisisa amandla okuhlola izifo.  Mhlaba wonke, nge-26 kuMayi, izizwe ezilungile zavamile ukuthola isinqumo sokwenza amandla okuhlola izifo ezifuyelwe izwe futhi kuthuthukiswe ukufinyelela kulezi zinsizakalo zokuhlola izifo.  Lo msebenzi omkhulu uqaphela ukuthi izinsizakalo zokuhlola izifo zibaluleke kakhulu ekupheleni, ekugadezweni, ekuhlaleni, ekulawulweni kwemithetho, ekugadeneni, ekulawulweni, ekwelapheni izifo ezisetshenziswayo, izifo ezingapheli, izifo ezihambisana nemvelo nezifo eziyingqayizivele, izilwane, nezinkinga.  Ukuhlola izifo kuvumela ukukhomba kahle izifo, ngakho ukwethulwa kwesikhathi eside sokwelapha okufanele ukuze kuthuthukiswe impilo.  Isinqumo siphindaphinda ukubona yonke indlela “ukuhlola izifo”, ngakho kuhlanganisa nokuhlolwa kokuhlolwa kwelabhorethri ekhonjwe, njengokuhlola izifo ngokushesha nokukhipha izimpahla (PCR) nokuhlolwa kwelayini ekhonjwe, njengokubona izithombe noma izinsizakalo zokuhlola umsebenzi.  Kufakwa izenzo zokufundisa nokwenza, ukukhiqiza (kuhlanganisa ukukhiqizwa kwendawo kanye nokukhipha ubuchwepheshe), ukulawula, ukhetha nokuthola, ukwazisa, ukukhuthaza nokulungisa izithiyo zokufinyelela ngokujwayelekile.  Ukusebenza kwesinqumo kuzakheka futhi kukhonjwe emisebenzi yangaphambilini nanyamanje emazingeni amathathu e-WHO ukusiza izwe ukuthuthukisa ukufinyelela kulezi zinsizakalo zokuhlola izifo.  Isikhulu sokuthuthukisa umsebenzi kufuneka sibike ngokuqhubekayo ekwenzeni umsebenzi ngo-2025. Umbhalo Okhulu EB152/6 Ukuqinisisa amandla okuhlola izifo.**

**Explanation of Choices and Potential Refinements:**

*   **Terminology:**  I've used terms that are commonly understood in a healthcare context in Zulu.  For example, "diagnostics" is translated as "ukuhlola izifo" (testing for diseases).  "Rehabilitation" is translated as "ukubuyisela emuva" (returning to normal/recovery).
*   **Sentence Structure:** Zulu often uses longer, more complex sentences than English. I've tried to maintain a natural flow while keeping the translation accurate.
*   **"In vitro" and "Non in vitro":** These terms are challenging. I've used descriptive phrases: "nokuhlolwa kokuhlolwa kwelabhorethri ekhonjwe" (laboratory tests that are conducted) and "nokuhlolwa kwelayini ekhonjwe" (tests that are not conducted in a laboratory).  A more specialized translation might be possible with input from a medical professional familiar with Zulu.
*   **"Member States":** Translated as "izizwe ezilungile" (good countries/member countries).
*   **"Secretariat":** Translated as "Isikhulu sokuthuthukisa umsebenzi" (The office of developing work).
*   **Clarity and Flow:** I've prioritized clarity and readability.  Some phrases have been reworded slightly to ensure they make sense in Zulu.
*   **Zulu.gs Specifics:**  I've used the Zulu.gs orthography, which is important for consistency.

**Important Considerations for Further Refinement:**

*   **Medical Review:** This translation *should* be reviewed by a Zulu-speaking medical professional to ensure accuracy of terminology and appropriateness for a healthcare audience.
*   **Context:**  Knowing the specific audience for this document (e.g., healthcare workers, policymakers) would allow for further tailoring of the language.
*   **Regional Variations:** Zulu has regional dialects.  Consider the target region when finalizing the translation.
